meaning: 安息日的替代字母大小寫形式。
sentences: The term sabbath refers to alternative letter-case form of Sabbath. 術語安息日是指安息日的替代字母大小寫形式。
The lesson introduced sabbath as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹安息日是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The soldier carried a sharp saber at his side. 士兵腰間佩著一把銳利的軍刀。
Fencing with sabers requires a lot of skill and agility. 用馬刀擊劍需要大量的技巧與敏捷性。

meaning: 故意破壞或損壞某物以阻止其成功。
sentences: The railway line had been sabotaged by enemy commandos. 鐵路線遭到敵方突擊隊的破壞。
Our plans were sabotaged. 我們的計劃被破壞了。
The farmer carried a heavy sack of potatoes across the field. 農夫扛著一袋沉重的馬鈴薯穿過田野。
He received the sack (was fired) after his poor performance. 業績不佳後，他被解僱了（裝進麻袋）。
I can't be sacked to get out of bed today. 今天我不能被解僱而起床。
We asked John if he wanted to come down the pub with us, but he couldn't be sacked. 我們問約翰是否願意和我們一起去酒吧，但他不能被解僱。

meaning: 神聖的行為和隨之而來的儀式，被認為是耶穌基督所製定的神聖恩典的外在標誌。
sentences: The term sacrament refers to a sacred act and the attendant ceremony, considered an outward sign of divine grace, instituted by Jesus Christ. 聖禮一詞指的是一種神聖的行為和隨之而來的儀式，被認為是耶穌基督所製定的神聖恩典的外在標記。
The lesson introduced sacrament as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了聖禮這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The ancient temple is considered a sacred place by the local community. 這座古廟被當地社區視為神聖之地。
Cows are sacred animals in certain cultures and are treated with respect. 在某些文化中，牛是神聖的動物，受到人們的尊敬。
Parents often make many sacrifices to provide a better future for their children. 父母常為了給孩子提供更好的未來而做出許多犧牲。
She had to sacrifice her hobby to focus more on her studies this semester. 這學期她不得不犧牲自己的愛好，以便更專注於學業。
The old sacrificial well is still there, but animals aren't thrown into it to appease monsters anymore. 舊的祭井還在，但不再把動物丟進去安撫怪物了。
Something described as sacrificial is relating to sacrifice. 被描述為犧牲的東西與犧牲有關。
I feel very sad because my best friend is moving away. 我感到非常難過，因為我最好的朋友要搬走了。
The movie has a very sad ending that made everyone cry. 這部電影有一個非常悲傷的結局，讓每個人都哭了。
The news of the disaster saddened everyone who heard it. 災難的消息讓所有聽聞的人感到悲傷。
She was deeply saddened by the loss of her pet. 寵物的離去讓她深感悲痛。
He placed the leather saddle on the horse and prepared for the journey. 他把皮革馬鞍放在馬背上，準備出發。
The company is saddled with a huge debt following the financial crisis. 公司因金融危機而背負（負擔）了巨額債務。

meaning: 因他人的痛苦或羞辱而感到高興或感到高興。
sentences: Something described as sadistic is delighting in or feeling pleasure from the pain or humiliation of others. 所謂施虐狂是指因他人的痛苦或羞辱而感到高興或感到高興。
The word sadistic is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 虐待狂這個詞經常被用來描述一個人、一件事或一種情況。
“Only when we climb up can we see it,” he said sadly. 「只有爬上去才能看到。」他悲傷地說。
If someone acts sadly, they do so in a way that is in a sad manner; sorrowfully. 如果某人的行為悲傷，那麼他們會以悲傷的方式這樣做；悲傷地。
There was a sense of deep sadness in the air after the tragedy. 事故發生後，空氣中瀰漫著一陣深沈的悲哀。
She expressed her sadness through her beautiful poetry. 她透過優美的詩歌表達她的憂愁。

meaning: 前往任何未開發地區，在野生動物的環境中觀看、拍攝或獵殺野生動物。
sentences: We're going on a safari in Kenya. 我們要去肯亞探險。
The term safari refers to a trip into any undeveloped area to see, photograph or to hunt wild animals in their own environment. Safari 一詞指的是前往任何未開發地區，在野生動物的環境中觀看、拍攝或獵殺野生動物的旅行。
It's important to keep your passwords safe and confidential. 保持密碼安全與保密非常重要。
Is it safe to walk alone in this neighborhood at night? 晚上在這個社區獨自走路安全嗎？

meaning: 充當守衛或保護作用的東西；辯護。
sentences: Getting a flu shot is a good safeguard against illness. 注射流感疫苗是預防疾病的良好保障。
The term safeguard refers to something that serves as a guard or protection; a defense. 防護一詞是指充當防護或保護作用的東西；防禦。

meaning: 以安全的方式；無風險；謹慎高於一切。
sentences: If someone acts safely, they do so in a way that is in a safe manner; without risk; using caution above all else. 如果某人的行為是安全的，那麼他們就是以安全的方式這樣做的；無風險；謹慎高於一切。
The speaker responded safely during the discussion. 演講者在討論過程中做出了安全的回應。
The airline's top priority is the safety and security of its passengers. 航空公司的首要任務是乘客的安全。
Please follow the safety rules to avoid any accidents. 請遵守安全守則以避免任何意外。

meaning: 番紅花屬植物，番紅花的一種。
sentences: The term saffron refers to A plant of species Crocus sativus, a crocus. 藏紅花一詞是指番紅花（Crocus sativus）種的植物，番紅花的一種。
We learned the meaning of saffron during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了藏紅花的意義。
The book tells the saga of a family living through the war. 這本書講述了一個在戰爭中生存的家族長篇傳奇。
Ancient Icelandic sagas are still popular today. 古代冰島英雄傳奇至今仍受歡迎。
He made a sagacious decision based on his years of experience. 他根據多年的經驗做出了一個睿智的決定。
She is a sagacious leader who knows how to motivate her team. 她是一位知道如何激勵團隊的睿智領導者。
The success of the project is a testament to his sagacity. 專案的成功證明了他的睿智。
We should learn from the sagacity of our elders. 我們應該向長輩的智慧學習。
He sought advice from the local sage in the village. 他向村裡的智者尋求建議。
Sage is a popular herb used in cooking and medicine. 鼠尾草是烹飪和醫藥中常用的熱門草藥。
The coach replied sagely and solved the issue. 教練sagely地回應，並解決了問題。
The team moved sagely when the deadline became urgent. 當期限變緊迫時，團隊sagely地行動。
The said party has denied the charges. 該黨否認了這些指控。
Something described as said is mentioned earlier; aforesaid. 前面提到所描述的事；前述。
The small boat sailed across the ocean in search of new lands. 小船橫越大洋尋找新土地。
We are going to sail around the island during our summer vacation. 我們打算在暑假期間環島航行。

meaning: 具有指定種類或數量的帆。
sentences: a three- sailed ship 三帆船
The report describes the result as sailed. 報告描述了航行的結果。
He enjoys going sailing on the lake during the weekends. 他週末喜歡在湖上進行帆船運動。
Sailing requires a lot of skill and knowledge of the wind. 帆船運動需要大量的技巧與風向知識。
The experienced sailor managed to navigate the ship through the storm. 經驗豐富的水手設法駕駛船隻穿過了風暴。
He dreamed of becoming a sailor and traveling around the world. 他夢想成為一名水手並環遊世界。
She is considered a saint by the local villagers for all her charity work. 由於她所做的慈善工作，當地村民將她視為聖人。
He was declared a saint by the church following his death several centuries ago. 他在幾個世紀前去世後被教會追封為聖徒。
She is a saintly woman who has devoted her life to helping others. 她是一位聖徒般的女性，一生致力於幫助他人。
The child had a saintly look on his face as he slept. 孩子睡覺時臉上帶著純潔的神情。
I decided to stop smoking for the sake of my overall health. 為了我的整體健康，我決定戒菸。
Let's avoid an argument for the sake of our friendship. 為了我們的友誼，讓我們避免爭論吧。

meaning: 主要由穆斯林使用的一種尊重的禮儀問候。
sentences: The word salaam is used in English writing and speech. 「salaam」一詞用於英語寫作和演講。
The lesson explained how to use salaam in context. 本課程解釋瞭如何在上下文中使用薩拉姆。
I usually have a fresh green salad for lunch every day. 我午餐通常每天吃新鮮的綠色沙拉。
Would you like some dressing on your fruit salad? 你想在水果沙拉上加點醬汁嗎？
She was recently promoted and received a significant salary hike. 她最近升職了，並獲得了顯著的加薪。
He earns a very decent monthly salary at the international bank. 他在一家國際銀行領取非常優渥的月薪。
The department store is having a massive summer sale this weekend. 百貨公司本週末正進行大型夏季特賣。
The house has been up for sale for several months now. 這房子已經掛牌出售好幾個月了。
The salesperson was very helpful and showed us several different models. 店員非常熱心，給我們展示了幾種不同的型號。
She works as a salesperson in a popular clothing store. 她在一家受歡迎的服飾店擔任銷售員。

meaning: 推銷員/推銷員/女推銷員
sentences: The salesperson was very polite and helpful to the customer. 店員對顧客非常禮貌且熱心。
She works as a saleswoman in a high-end fashion boutique. 她在一家高端時尚精品店擔任銷售員。

meaning: 值得注意的是；相關的或相關的。
sentences: The article is not exhaustive, but it covers the salient points pretty well. 這篇文章並不詳盡，但很好地涵蓋了要點。
Something described as salient is worthy of note; pertinent or relevant. 被描述為顯著的東西值得注意；相關的或相關的。
a saline taste 鹹味
Something described as saline is resembling salt. 被描述為鹽水的東西類似於鹽。
Saliva helps to break down food in the mouth. 唾液有助於在口中分解食物。
The dog's jowls were dripping with saliva. 這隻狗的臉頰正流著口水。
The delicious smell of the food made him salivate. 食物的香味讓他流口水。
He began to salivate at the thought of winning the championship. 想到奪冠他就開始垂涎（極度渴望）。

meaning: 進行突然攻擊（例如從防禦位置攻擊敵人）。
sentences: A feeding strategy of some birds is to sally out from a perch to snatch an insect and then returning to the same or a different perch. 一些鳥類的進食策略是從棲息地突然出來捕捉昆蟲，然後返回相同或不同的棲息地。
To sally means to make a sudden attack (e.g. on an enemy from a defended position). 突襲意味著突然攻擊（例如從防禦位置攻擊敵人）。
The restaurant is famous for its delicious fresh salmon and seafood dishes. 這家餐廳以其美味的新鮮鮭魚和海鮮料理而聞名。
Thousands of salmon swim upstream every year to reach their spawning grounds. 每年有數千條鮭魚溯流而上，前往它們的產卵地。

meaning: 引起傷寒和沙門氏菌病的沙門氏菌屬兩種桿狀細菌，特別是腸道沙門氏菌的任何血清型，表現為食物中毒和其他疾病。
sentences: Everyone got sick from salmonella in the undercooked meat. 每個人都因未煮熟的肉中的沙門氏菌而生病。

The term salmonella refers to any of the serotypes of the two species of rod-shaped bacteria, of the genus Salmonella, especially Salmonella enterica, that cause typhoid fever and salmonellosis, manifest as food poisoning and other diseases. 沙門氏菌一詞是指沙門氏菌屬兩種桿狀細菌的任何血清型，特別是腸道沙門氏菌，可引起傷寒和沙門氏菌病，表現為食物中毒和其他疾病。
She decided to go to the beauty salon to get her hair and nails done. 她決定去美容院做頭髮和指甲。
The artist's home features a large salon where he hosts exhibitions. 這位藝術家的家中有一個大沙龍（客廳），在那裡他會舉辦展覽。

meaning: 英國酒館的酒廊酒吧與公共酒吧形成鮮明對比。
sentences: A pint of beer in the saloon bar costs a penny more than in the public bar. 酒吧裡的一品脫啤酒比公共酒吧貴一分錢。
The term saloon refers to a lounge bar in an English public house, contrasted with the public bar. 「沙龍」一詞指的是英國酒館中的休閒酒吧，與公共酒吧形成鮮明對比。
Please don't add too much salt to the soup; it's not healthy. 請不要在湯裡加太多鹽，不健康。
Could you please pass me the salt and pepper? 你能把鹽和胡椒粉遞給我嗎？

meaning: 一條鱒魚離開鹽水，往溪流上游。
sentences: The term salter refers to A trout leaving salt water to ascend a stream. 術語“鹹魚”是指離開鹹水並沿著溪流而上的鱒魚。
We learned the meaning of salter during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了 salter 的意思。
The soup is a bit too salty for my taste; can I have some water? 這湯對我來說有點太鹹了；能給我點水嗎？
The sea air has a fresh and salty scent that I love. 海邊的空氣有一種我喜愛的清新且鹹鹹的味道。
'Dear Sir' is a formal salutation used in letters. 'Dear Sir' 是信件中使用的正式問候語。
The two colleagues exchanged a quick salutation in the corridor. 兩位同事在走廊裡互致簡短的問候。
The soldiers stood erect and saluted as the national flag was raised. 當國旗升起時，士兵們挺直身子敬禮。
The city fired a twenty-one gun salute to welcome the foreign diplomat. 城市鳴放了 21 響禮炮來歡迎外國外交官。
The research team managed to salvage some important data from the server. 研究團隊設法從伺服器中搶救出了一些重要數據。
He tried to salvage his reputation following the financial scandal yesterday. 在昨天的金融醜聞後，他試圖挽回自己的名譽。

meaning: 被拯救的過程，被拯救的狀態（從地獄）。
sentences: Collective salvation is not possible without personal salvation, but the latter is achievable. 沒有個人救贖就不可能實現集體救贖，但後者是可以實現的。
The term salvation refers to the process of being saved, the state of having been saved (from hell). 拯救一詞指的是被拯救的過程，被拯救的狀態（從地獄）。
She applied a soothing salve to the minor burn. 她在輕微燙傷處塗抹了舒緩藥膏。
He tried to salve his conscience by donating money to charity. 他試圖透過向慈善機構捐款來減輕（緩解）良心的不安。

meaning: 巴西交際舞或舞蹈風格。
sentences: The term samba refers to a Brazilian ballroom dance or dance style. 森巴舞一詞指的是巴西交誼舞或舞蹈風格。
The lesson introduced samba as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了森巴舞，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
We attended the same university and graduated in the same year. 我們就讀同一所大學，並在同年畢業。
The results of the two experiments were exactly the same. 這兩次實驗的結果完全相同。
To sammy means to moisten (animal skins) with water. 薩米的意思是用水潤濕（動物的皮膚）。
People may sammy in different situations depending on the context. 根據具體情況，人們可能會處於不同的情況。
The store provided a free sample of the new perfume to customers. 商店向顧客提供新香水的免費樣品。
The researchers collected water samples from the mountain stream. 研究人員從山間溪流中採集了水樣。

meaning: 封建日本，侍奉大名的士兵。
sentences: The term samurai refers to in feudal Japan, a soldier who served a daimyo. 武士一詞在封建日本指的是為大名服務的士兵。
The lesson introduced samurai as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「武士」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The United Nations imposed economic sanctions on the country. 聯合國對該國實施了經濟制裁。
The committee finally sanctioned the new project. 委員會最終批准了新專案。
The term sanctity refers to holiness of life or disposition; saintliness. 「聖潔」一詞是指生命或性情的聖潔；聖潔。
The lesson introduced sanctity as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了神聖性這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 安全、避難或保護的地方。
sentences: My car is a sanctuary, where none can disturb me except for people who cut me off. 我的車是一個避難所，除了那些攔住我的人之外，沒有人可以打擾我。
The term sanctuary refers to a place of safety, refuge, or protection. 避難所一詞指的是安全、避難所或保護的地方。
The children were happily playing with the sand on the beach. 孩子們正開心地在海灘上玩沙子。
The hourglass was filled with fine white sand. 沙漏裡裝滿了細細的白沙。
She bought a pair of comfortable leather sandals for her summer holiday. 她為暑假買了一雙舒適的皮革涼鞋。
It was so hot that everyone was wearing shorts and sandals at the beach. 天氣太熱了，每個人在海灘上都穿著短褲和涼鞋。
She bought a comfortable pair of leather sandals for the summer. 她買了一雙舒適的皮涼鞋過夏天。
Don't forget to pack your sandals for the beach holiday. 別忘了為海灘假期帶上你的涼鞋。

meaning: 兒童遊樂區由裝滿沙子的盒子組成。
sentences: Her children were playing in the sandbox. 她的孩子們正在沙箱裡玩耍。
The term sandbox refers to a children's play area consisting of a box filled with sand. 術語沙箱是指由裝滿沙子的盒子組成的兒童遊樂區。
If you sanded every day, your skills improve quickly. 如果你每天都sanded，能力會進步得很快。
Our teacher sandeded the plan carefully yesterday. 我們老師昨天仔細地sanded了計畫。
Use a piece of sandpaper to smooth the surface of the wood. 利用一塊砂紙磨平木材表面。
He spent the afternoon sandpaping the old table. 他下午都在用砂紙打磨舊桌子。

meaning: 由沙子、黏土等膠結而成的固結和壓實產生的沉積岩。
sentences: The term sandstone refers to a sedimentary rock produced by the consolidation and compaction of sand, cemented with clay etc. 砂岩一詞是指由砂、黏土等膠結而成的固結壓實而成的沉積岩。
The lesson introduced sandstone as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了砂岩這個易於理解的有用術語。
I'd like a ham and cheese sandwich for my lunch, please. 我午餐想要一個火腿起司三明治。
She made a batch of delicious sandwiches for the picnic. 她為野餐做了一批美味的三明治。
Some plants grow best in sandy soil. 有些植物在沙質土壤中生長得最好。
Something described as sandy is containing sand. 被描述為沙質的東西含有沙子。
No sane person would do such a dangerous thing! 沒有一個理智的人會做出如此危險的事！
He managed to stay sane despite the extreme pressure. 儘管面臨極大壓力，他還是成功保持了神智正常。
He has a sanguine outlook on the future of the project. 他對專案的前景持樂觀態度。
She had a sanguine complexion after her morning run. 晨跑後，她的臉色紅潤。
Proper sanitary conditions are essential for preventing the spread of disease. 適當的衛生條件對於防止疾病傳播至關重要。
The restaurant was closed due to poor sanitary standards. 這家餐廳因衛生標準差而被關閉。
Improving sanitation is essential for maintaining public health in the city. 改善環境衛生對於維持城市公眾健康至關重要。
The project aims to provide clean drinking water and modern sanitation. 該專案旨在提供清潔飲用水 and 現代公共衛生設施。
preserve one's sanity 保持理智
lose your sanity 失去理智
The story features a sapient old owl who provides guidance to the animals. 故事以一隻為動物提供引導的睿智老貓頭鷹為主角。
He gave a sapient account of the historical events. 他對歷史事件做了一番睿智的描述。

meaning: 一種清澈的深藍色剛玉，具有寶石般的價值。
sentences: The term sapphire refers to a clear deep blue variety of corundum, valued as a precious stone. 藍寶石一詞是指一種清澈的深藍色剛玉，具有珍貴的寶石價值。
The lesson introduced sapphire as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了藍寶石作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
I don't like the tone of sarcasm in your voice. 我不喜歡你說話時那種諷刺的語氣。
She used sarcasm to express her disapproval of the proposal. 她利用諷刺來表達對該提議的不贊成。
a sarcastic quip 諷刺的俏皮話
the teacher's sarcastic tone 老師諷刺的語氣
I love eating canned sardines with crackers for a snack. 我喜歡吃沙丁魚罐頭配餅乾當點心。
The passengers were packed like sardines on the crowded bus. 乘客們在擁擠的公車上被擠得像沙丁魚一樣。
He gave a sardonic smile after hearing the news. 聽到消息後，他露出了一個諷刺的微笑。
She wrote a sardonic account of her experiences at the party. 她對自己在派對上的經歷寫了一篇嘲弄式的記述。

meaning: 矩形框架，鋸子在其中拉緊並通過其上下往復運動；門。
sentences: The term sash refers to the rectangular frame in which the saw is strained and by which it is carried up and down with a reciprocating motion; the gate. 術語「窗框」是指矩形框架，鋸子在其中拉緊並通過它上下往復運動；大門。
The lesson introduced sash as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了窗扇作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 智能、時尚；時髦的;別緻的。
sentences: Something described as sassy is smart, fashionable; stylish; chic. 被形容為時髦的東西是聰明的、時尚的；時髦的;別緻。
The word sassy is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. sassy 這個字常用來形容人、事或情況。

meaning: 邪惡的、惡魔般的、惡魔般的或惡魔般的。
sentences: Can Abrahamic religious leaders call other religions "satanic" without being in jail? 亞伯拉罕宗教領袖可以稱其他宗教為「撒旦」而不入獄嗎？
Something described as satanic is evil, fiendish, devilish or diabolical. 被描述為撒旦的東西是邪惡的、惡魔般的、惡魔般的或惡魔般的。
The moon is the only natural satellite that orbits the Earth. 月亮是唯一繞地球運行的天然衛星。
Weather satellites provide valuable information about approaching storms and hurricanes. 氣象衛星提供了關於即將到來的風暴和颶風的寶貴資訊。

meaning: 使（紙、銀等）變得像緞子一樣光滑有光澤。
sentences: To satin means to make (paper, silver, etc.) smooth and glossy like satin. 「緞」的意思是讓（紙、銀等）變得像緞子一樣光滑、有光澤。
People may satin in different situations depending on the context. 根據不同的環境，人們可能會在不同的情況下織緞。
The movie is a clever satire on modern politics. 這部電影是對現代政治的巧妙諷刺。
He is a master of political satire. 他是一位政治諷刺大師。
She wrote several satirical poems about her colleagues. 她寫了幾首諷刺同事的詩。
The magazine features satirical cartoons about current events. 這本雜誌刊登關於時事的諷刺漫畫。
She felt a great sense of satisfaction after completing the difficult task. 完成這項艱巨的任務後，她感到非常有成就感（滿意）。
Customer satisfaction is our top priority, and we strive to provide the best service. 顧客滿意是我們的首要任務，我們努力提供最好的服務。
The results of the test were deemed satisfactory by the doctor. 檢查結果被醫生認為是令人滿意的。
They finally reached a satisfactory agreement after months. 經過數月，他們最終達成了一個滿意的協議。
I'm satisfied with your progress in your homework, so you can watch television now. 我對你作業的進展感到滿意，所以你現在可以看電視了。
The report describes the result as satisfied. 報告稱結果令人滿意。
The restaurant's excellent service and food satisfied all the guests. 餐廳優質的服務與食物滿足了所有客人。
He worked hard to satisfy his boss's high expectations. 他努力工作以滿足老闆的高期望。

meaning: 當輸入訊號增加時，線性元件（例如線性放大器）的輸出明顯偏離輸入的線性函數的點。
sentences: Modulation often requires that amplifiers operate below saturation. 調製通常要求放大器在飽和狀態下工作。

The term saturation refers to the point at which the output of a linear device, such as a linear amplifier, deviates significantly from being a linear function of the input when the input signal is increased. 飽和一詞是指當輸入訊號增加時，線性元件（例如線性放大器）的輸出顯著偏離輸入的線性函數的點。
I usually go for a long run on Saturday morning. 我通常在週六早上進行長跑。
We are planning a trip to the beach next Saturday. 我們正計畫下週六去海灘。
Would you like some extra hot sauce with your fried chicken? 妳的炸雞要加點額外的辣醬嗎？
The chef used fresh tomatoes and herbs to make the pasta sauce. 廚師用新鮮番茄和香料製作義大利麵醬。
She placed the coffee cup gently on the delicate china saucer. 她將咖啡杯輕輕放在精緻的瓷碟上。
The cat was happily licking some fresh milk from a small saucer. 貓正開心地舔著小碟子裡的鮮奶。

meaning: 類似醬料；具有醬汁的濃稠度或質感。
sentences: Bring the tomatoes to a boil and then simmer until they reach a saucy consistency. 將西紅柿煮沸，然後小火煮至濃稠。
The report describes the result as saucy. 該報告將這一結果描述為「俏皮」。
I really need a relaxing sauna after my workout. 運動後我真的需要做個放鬆的桑拿。
The hotel features a large indoor swimming pool and a sauna. 飯店設有一個大型室內游泳池和一間桑拿房。
Grilled saury is a popular dish in autumn in some Asian countries. 在某些亞洲國家，烤秋刀魚是秋季的一道熱門菜餚。
The fisherman caught a large quantity of saury this morning. 漁夫今早捕獲了大量的秋刀魚。
I usually have two grilled sausages and eggs for breakfast. 我早餐通常吃兩根烤香腸和雞蛋。
Germany is famous for its wide variety of traditional sausages. 德國以其種類繁多的傳統香腸聞名。
The heavy storm caused savage damage to the coastal village last night. 強風暴昨晚給海濱村莊造成了慘重（野蠻）的破壞。
He was met with a savage response when he questioned her professional ability. 當他質疑她的專業能力時，遭到了殘暴（猛烈）的回擊。
The scientist is a renowned savant in the field of physics. 這位科學家是物理學領域著名的學者。
The child is a musical savant who can play several instruments perfectly. 這個孩子是個音樂奇才（專家），可以完美彈奏幾種樂器。
I'm trying to save money for my upcoming trip to Japan. 我正在努力存錢，為即將到來的日本之旅做準備。
Please don't forget to save the file before you close it. 離開前請別忘了儲存檔案。

meaning: 保留以供將來使用而不是花掉。
sentences: A penny saved is a penny earned. 節省一分錢就是賺一分錢。
The report describes the result as saved. 該報告描述了已儲存的結果。

He’s a saver and she’s a spender; you’d think the marriage would be doomed, but he keeps them from going into bankruptcy and she makes sure they have a lot of fun. 他是個儲蓄者，她是個花錢者；你可能會認為這段婚姻注定會失敗，但他阻止了他們破產，而且她確保他們過得很開心。
The term saver refers to one who keeps savings more than usual. 「儲蓄者」一詞是指比平常保留更多儲蓄的人。
She decided to use all her savings to travel around the world. 她決定用她所有的積蓄環遊世界。
Energy saving is an important goal for modern sustainable life. 節能是現代永續生活的一個重要目標。
The volunteers were seen as the saviors of the village after the disaster. 志工們被視為災後村莊的救星。
He was praised as the savior of the company. 他被譽為公司的拯救者。
She sat quietly and savored her cup of hot tea. 她安靜地坐著，品味著她那杯熱茶。
The food had a savory aroma that filled the entire house. 食物散發出一股充滿整間屋子的美味香氣。
The restaurant offers a wide selection of savory dishes. 這家餐廳提供多種鹹味（美味）菜餚選擇。
She made a savory pie with meat and vegetables. 她做了一個加了肉和蔬菜的鹹派。

meaning: Savoy 的替代字母大小寫形式（“捲心菜類型”）。
sentences: The term savoy refers to alternative letter-case form of Savoy (“type of cabbage”). 術語 savoy 是指 Savoy 的替代字母大小寫形式（“捲心菜類型”）。
The lesson introduced savoy as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 savoy 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 精明、消息靈通、洞察力強。
sentences: Something described as savvy is shrewd, well-informed and perceptive. 精明的意思是精明、見多識廣、洞察力強。
The word savvy is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. savvy這個字常用來形容人、事或情況。
He used a sharp saw to cut the thick branch of the tree. 他用一把鋒利的鋸子鋸斷了樹的一根粗枝。
I saw a beautiful rainbow in the sky after the rain stopped. 雨停後，我看到天空中有一道美麗的彩虹。

meaning: 用於切割（銑削）木材或（很少）其他硬質材料（例如石頭）的機器、建築物或公司。
sentences: He brought his portable sawmill and turned the old beams into interesting flooring. 他帶來了他的便攜式鋸木廠，將舊橫梁變成了有趣的地板。
The old sawmill still has its waterwheel but they took the saw away years ago. 老鋸木廠仍然有水車，但幾年前他們把鋸子拿走了。

meaning: 鋸木的人，尤其是在鋸坑裡鋸木的人。
sentences: The term sawyer refers to one who saws timber, especially in a sawpit. 鋸工一詞指的是鋸木的人，尤其是在鋸坑中鋸木的人。
The lesson introduced sawyer as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 sawyer 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 吹薩克斯風的人；薩克斯風吹奏者。
sentences: The saxophones typically sit behind the flutes in a concert band. 在音樂會樂隊中，薩克斯風通常位於長笛後方。
The term saxophone refers to someone who plays the saxophone; a saxophonist. 薩克斯風一詞指的是演奏薩克斯風的人；薩克斯風吹奏者。
What did he say about our new project proposal? 他對我們的新專案提案說了什麼？
It's much easier to say than to actually do. 說起來比實際做起來容易得多。
The article mentioned say-so in a short paragraph. 文章在一段短文中提到了 say-so。
We practiced using say-so in two different sentences. 我們練習把 say-so 放進兩個不同句子裡。
'Better late than never' is a well-known English saying. 'Better late than never' 是一句著名的英語諺語。
As the old saying goes, 'Practice makes perfect'. 俗話說，'熟能生巧'。
The wound began to scab over after a few days. 幾天後傷口開始結痂了。
Don't pick at the scab; it will heal on its own. 別去摳那個痂；它會自行痊癒。
The workers are building a large scaffold around the old house. 工人們正在舊房子周圍搭建一個巨大的鷹架。
The monument was covered in scaffolding for several months during restoration. 修復期間，這座紀念碑被鷹架覆蓋了幾個月。

meaning: 以前用於減少肱骨脫位的機器。
sentences: The term scala refers to A machine formerly used for reducing dislocations of the humerus. 術語 scala 是指先前用於減少肱骨脫位的機器。
We learned the meaning of scala during today's lesson. 今天的課程我們學習了scala的意思。
The project is being implemented on a large scale. 該專案正大規模實施。
Please weigh the apples on the kitchen scale. 請在廚房秤上稱一下這些蘋果。
The map has a scale of one to fifty thousand centimeters. 地圖的比例尺是一比五萬公分。
Please step onto the scales to measure your weight and height. 請站上秤台以測量您的體重與身高。
The butcher put the sausages on the scales. 屠夫把香腸放在秤上。
The term scales refers to A device for measuring weight. 術語「秤」是指測量重量的裝置。
She added some chopped scallions to the fried rice. 她在炒飯裡加了一些蔥花。
Scallions are a common ingredient in many Asian dishes. 蔥是許多亞洲料理中常見的食材。
She has a very sensitive scalp and needs to use a mild shampoo. 她頭皮非常敏感，需要使用溫和的洗髮精。
He suffered a minor injury to his scalp during the match. 他在比賽中頭皮受了輕傷。

meaning: 被鱗片覆蓋或充滿鱗片。
sentences: a scaly fish a scaly stem 有鱗的魚 有鱗的莖
The report describes the result as scaly. 該報告將結果描述為大規模的。

meaning: 使用詐騙手法宣傳的東西。
sentences: That new diet burger is a scam. 那個新的減肥漢堡是一個騙局。
The term scam refers to something that is promoted using scams. 術語「詐騙」是指使用詐騙來宣傳的東西。
Please scan the documents and send them to my office by email. 請掃描這些文件並通過電子郵件寄到我的辦公室。
The security guard scanned the crowd for any signs of suspicious behavior. 保全人員仔細掃視（細看）人群，尋找是否有可疑行為。
The financial scandal led to the resignation of several high-level officials. 金融醜聞導致幾位高層官員辭職。
The story of the corruption scandal was featured on the front page of every newspaper. 腐敗醜聞的故事登上了每家報紙的頭版。

meaning: 言論 或 寫作 ： 寫作 ： 惡意 。
sentences: The report describes the result as scandalous. 報告稱這項結果是可恥的。 報告稱這項結果是可恥的。 報告稱這是可恥的。
Everyone noticed the scandalous tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這條訊息的誹謗語氣。 每個人都注意到了這條訊息的誹謗語氣。 每個人都注意到了這條誹謗誹謗語氣的訊息。
I need to buy a new wireless scanner for my office. 我需要為我的辦公室買一台新的無線掃描器。
The hospital has a high-tech brain scanner for patients. 醫院為病人配備了高科技的大腦掃描器。

meaning: 不滿、不大、不充足；幾乎不夠；很少；微薄的。
sentences: a scant allowance of provisions or water; a scant pattern of cloth for a garment 食物或水的供給不足；服裝布料的少量圖案
Something described as scant is not full, large, or plentiful; scarcely sufficient; scanty; meager. 被描述為「少」的東西並不完整、大或充足；幾乎不夠；很少；微薄。

meaning: 有人因為某些失敗而受到不公平的指責或懲罰。
sentences: He is making me a scapegoat for his own poor business decisions and the supply chain disruptions caused by the hurricane! 他讓我成為他自己糟糕的商業決策和颶風造成的供應鏈中斷的替罪羊！
The term scapegoat refers to someone unfairly blamed or punished for some failure. 替罪羔羊一詞指的是某人因某些失敗而受到不公平的指責或懲罰。

meaning: 肩胛骨。位於上背部、連接肩膀動作的重要骨頭。
sentences: The scapula moves when you lift or rotate your arm. 當你抬起或轉動手臂時，肩胛骨會跟著移動。
A muscle attached to the scapula helps stabilize the shoulder. 連接在肩胛骨上的肌肉有助於穩定肩膀。
He has a small scar on his forehead from a childhood accident. 他額頭上有一個小時候意外留下的傷疤。
The experience of war left a lasting scar on the minds of the survivors. 戰爭的經歷在倖存者的心中留下了持久的創傷（傷痕）。
Fresh water is a scarce and precious resource in this region. 淡水在這個地區是稀缺且寶貴的資源。
Jobs are becoming increasingly scarce due to the economic crisis. 由於經濟危機，工作正變得日益稀缺。
We should try to 'scarcely' the problem from a different angle. 我們應該嘗試從不同角度來「scarcely」這個問題。
The new software will help us 'scarcely' tasks more efficiently. 這款新軟體將幫助我們更有效地「scarcely」任務。
a scarcity of grain 糧食短缺
The term scarcity refers to an inadequate amount of something; a shortage. 稀缺一詞是指某物的數量不足；短缺。
The sudden loud noise scared the little bird away. 突然的巨響把小鳥嚇跑了。
Don't scare me like that! I didn't see you coming. 別那樣嚇我！我沒看到你過來。

meaning: 任何看似可怕卻不構成危險的事物；一隻紙老虎。
sentences: The term scarecrow refers to anything that appears terrifying but presents no danger; a paper tiger. 稻草人一詞指的是任何看似可怕但不存在危險的事物。一隻紙老虎。
The lesson introduced scarecrow as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了稻草人作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The little girl was scared of the dark and wanted a light on. 小女孩害怕黑暗，想要開著燈。
I was scared that I might fail the important driving test. 我害怕我可能會沒通過那次重要的駕駛考試。
She wore a beautiful colorful silk scarf tied around her neck. 她在脖子上繫了一條漂亮的繽紛絲巾。
Don't forget to wear a warm wool scarf; it's freezing outside. 別忘了戴上暖和的羊毛圍巾；外面冷極了。
She wore a bright scarlet dress to the party. 她穿了一件亮鮮紅色的連衣裙去參加派對。
The sky turned scarlet as the sun began to set. 太陽開始下山時，天空變成了鮮紅色。
The movie was so scary that I couldn't stop trembling with fear. 那部電影太恐怖了，我嚇得直發抖。
It was a scary experience walking alone through the dark woods. 深夜獨自走過黑暗的森林是一次可怕的經歷。

meaning: 迫切要求離開，通常被說話者和聽者認為是無禮的。
sentences: Scat! Go on! Get out of here! 斯卡特！繼續！離開這裡！
The lesson introduced scat as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 scat 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The birds scattered in all directions when the cat appeared. 貓出現時，鳥兒向四面八方散去。
He scattered some seeds in the garden and hoped they would grow. 他在花園裡撒了一些種子，希望它們能生長。
The small villages are scattered across the mountains. 小村莊零星散布在山區。
There were scattered clouds in the blue sky this morning. 今早藍天中有幾片零散的雲。

meaning: 少量的東西被分散（在隨機點）。
sentences: There will be a scattering of showers, with heavy rain in places. 局部地區有陣雨，部分地區有大雨。
The term scattering refers to A small quantity of something being dispersed (at random points). 術語“散射”是指少量的東西被分散（在隨機點）。

meaning: 拾荒 的人，特別是透過 垃圾 rel="mw:WikiLink"的人href="/wiki/food" title="food">食物 或有用的東西。
sentences: A scavenger picked through the rubbish heap. 一個 拾荒者 在垃圾堆中撿拾。 一名拾荒者在垃圾堆中撿拾。 一個拾荒者在垃圾堆中撿拾。

The term scavenger refers to Someone who scavenges, especially one who searches through rubbish for food or useful things. 拾荒者一詞是指 拾荒 的人，特別是透過 垃圾 食物 或有用的東西。 拾荒者一詞指的是拾荒者，尤其是在垃圾中尋找食物或有用物品的人。 拾荒者活動是指拾荒的人，特別是撿拾垃圾食物或有用的東西。

meaning: 在垃圾中尋找有用材料的行為。
sentences: Our scavengings at the rubbish dump often yielded items of value. 我們在垃圾場撿拾物品時常常會發現一些有價值的物品。
The term scavenging refers to The act of searching through refuse for useful material. 術語「清理」是指在垃圾中尋找有用材料的行為。
The researchers considered several different scenarios for the future of the project. 研究人員考慮了該專案未來的幾種不同方案（事態）。
In the worst-case scenario, the company would have to close all its branches. 在最壞的情況（方案）下，公司將不得不關閉所有分部。
The final scene of the movie was extremely moving and powerful. 電影的最後一幕極其感人且震撼。
The police arrived at the scene of the accident within minutes. 警察在幾分鐘內抵達了事故現場。

meaning: 四 無籽的, 無核的

We asked the seeker for advice before making a decision. 我們在做決定前先向這位seeker請教。
Our team invited a skilled seeker to lead the workshop. 我們團隊邀請了一位有經驗的seeker帶領工作坊。

meaning: 以得體的方式；莊重地;有禮地。
sentences: If someone acts seemingly, they do so in a way that is in a seemly manner; decorously; with propriety. 如果某人的行為看似合理，那麼他的行為方式就很得體；莊重地;與禮。

The nurse seened the message carefully yesterday. 護理師昨天仔細地seen了訊息。
If you seen every day, your skills improve quickly. 如果你每天都seen，能力會進步得很快。

meaning: 一到這座海濱城市,他的錢包就被偷了,所以他不得不
sentences: The seer explained the problem clearly to everyone. 這位seer清楚地向大家說明了問題。

meaning: 充滿了未表達的 憤怒 ；處於 臉色蒼白 的狀態。
sentences: The report describes the result as seething. 報告稱這項結果令人震驚。 報告稱這項結果令人震驚。 報告稱此舉令人震驚。

She cut the orange into segments and shared them with the children. 她把橘子切成片（切片）分給孩子們。

meaning: 分成片段的行為或實例。
sentences: The term segmentation refers to the act or an instance of dividing into segments. 術語分段是指劃分為片段的行為或實例。
The lesson introduced segmentation as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了分段這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 一種長網，頂部附有浮子，底部附有沈子（重物），用於淺水中捕魚。
sentences: The term seine refers to a long net having floats attached at the top and sinkers (weights) at the bottom, used in shallow water for catching fish. 圍網一詞是指頂部附有浮子、底部附有沈子（重物）的長網，用於淺水中捕魚。
The lesson introduced seine as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「圍網」這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 與地震或地球的其他振動有關或由地震或其他地球振動引起。
sentences: seismic activity 地震活動
Something described as seismic is related to, or caused by an earthquake or other vibration of the Earth. 被描述為地震的事物與地震或地球的其他振動有關或由地震或其他地球振動引起。
The opportunity was too good to miss, so he decided to seize it immediately. 這個機會太好了，不能錯過，所以他決定立即抓住它。

The pirates buried their seizings and marked the map with an X. 海盜埋葬了他們的 戰利品 ，並在地圖上標上了 X。 海盜埋葬了他們的戰利品，並在地圖上標上了 X。海盜埋葬了他們的戰利品，並在地圖上標上了 X。
The term seizing refers to Something seized. 術語「奪取」指的是 某物 奪取 。 奪取一詞是指奪取某物。 術語“奪取”是指某物奪取。

meaning: 透過武力或法律權利取得佔有的行為。
sentences: the seizure of a thief, a property, a throne, etc. 奪取小偷、財產、王位等

He seldom goes to the cinema because he prefers watching at home. 他很少去電影院，因為他比較喜歡在家看。

Please select your favorite color from the choices provided. 請從提供的選項中選擇您最喜歡的顏色。
Only a few elite students were selected for the exchange program. 只有少數精英學生被選中參加交換計畫。
The shop offers a wide selection of organic fruit and vegetables. 這家店提供多樣化的有機水果和蔬菜選擇。
The selection process for the scholarship was very rigorous. 獎學金的甄選過程非常嚴格。
The university has a very selective admission process for its new students. 大學對新生的錄取過程非常嚴格（精挑細選）。
He is very selective about the people he invites to his holiday parties. 他對邀請參加假期派對的人選非常挑剔（精挑細選）。

meaning: 以選擇性的方式，僅影響或適用於某些選定的案例。
sentences: If someone acts selectively, they do so in a way that is in a selective manner, only affecting or applying to some selected cases. 如果某人有選擇性地行動，他們就會以選擇性的方式這樣做，只影響或適用於某些選定的情況。
The speaker responded selectively during the discussion. 發言者在討論中選擇性地作出回應。

meaning: 選擇或選擇的某人或某事。
sentences: The term selector refers to someone or something which selects or chooses. 選擇者一詞是指選擇或選擇的某人或某物。
The lesson introduced selector as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了選擇器作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
She took a deep interest in self-improvement and development. 她對自我提升與發展產生了濃厚的興趣。
It's important to be true to your true self and your beliefs. 忠於真實的自我與信念是很重要的。
It was very selfish of him to take all the credit for the work. 他獨攬所有工作功勞是非常自私的。

The store sells a wide variety of fresh fruit and vegetables. 這家店銷售各式各樣的新鮮水果和蔬菜。

meaning: 賣東西的人；供應商；一名職員。
sentences: Alisha was a seller of fine books. 艾莉莎是一位優秀書籍的賣家。
The term seller refers to someone who sells; a vendor; a clerk. 賣方一詞是指進行銷售的人；供應商；一名職員。
You've got to work on your selling. 你必須努力推銷。
The term selling refers to Skill at salesmanship. 銷售一詞是指銷售技巧。

meaning: 為了經濟利益或其他利益而出賣自己的原則的人。
sentences: The rock star used to be hardcore, but now he's just a sellout. 這位搖滾明星曾經是鐵桿，但現在他只是一個背叛者。

meaning: 瑣碎的或瑣碎的；狡辯, 挑剔。
sentences: Something described as semantic is petty or trivial; quibbling, niggling. 被描述為語義的東西是瑣碎的或瑣碎的；狡辯，挑剔。

meaning: 語言學的一個分支，研究詞的意義。
sentences: Semantics is a foundation of lexicography. 語意學是詞典學的基礎。

meaning: 男性生殖器官產生的黏稠乳狀液體，含有生殖細胞。
sentences: The term semen refers to a sticky, milky fluid produced in male reproductive organs that contains the reproductive cells. 精液一词是指男性生殖器官中产生的含有生殖细胞的粘稠乳状液体。

meaning: 半拖車；牽引拖車；十八輪車；一篇文章。
sentences: The term semi refers to a semi-trailer; a tractor-trailer; an eighteen-wheeler; an artic. 半拖車一詞是指半拖車；牽引拖車；十八輪車；一篇文章。

meaning: 當輪只剩下四名球員或球隊的附加賽，決賽前的階段。
sentences: The term semifinal refers to a playoff in the round with only four players or teams left, the stage before the final. 半決賽一詞指的是決賽之前的階段，即只剩下四名球員或球隊的一輪附加賽。

meaning: 極具影響力，特別是在某些原創方面，並為未來的發展或研究提供基礎。

Something described as seminal is highly influential, especially in some original way, and providing a basis for future development or research. 被描述為開創性的東西具有很高的影響力，特別是以某種原創的方式，並為未來的發展或研究提供基礎。

meaning: 一位在外國神學院接受教育的羅馬天主教神父；神學院學生。
sentences: The term seminary refers to a Roman Catholic priest educated in a foreign seminary; a seminarist. 神學院一詞是指在外國神學院接受教育的羅馬天主教神父；一名修士。
The lesson introduced seminary as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了神學院作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 在一些兩院制立法體系中，上議院或眾議院。
sentences: The term senate refers to in some bicameral legislative systems, the upper house or chamber. 在一些兩院制立法體系中，「參議院」一詞指的是上議院或參議院。

The package was addressed to someone we didn't know, so we returned it to the sender. 包裹的收件人是我們不認​​識的人，因此我們將其退回給寄件者。
The term sender refers to someone who sends. 術語「發送者」是指發送訊息的人。
He is a senior software engineer with over ten years of work experience. 他是一位擁有超過十年工作經驗的資深軟體工程師。
The hotel offers special discounts for senior citizens on weekdays. 飯店在平日為年長者提供特別折扣。

meaning: 與其他成員相比，衡量一個人成為組織成員的時間長短，並著眼於向那些成為組織成員時間較長的人授予特權。
sentences: It's an old-fashioned company, with parking spaces and other perks doled out on the basis of seniority. 這是一家老式公司，根據資歷提供停車位和其他福利。

The term seniority refers to a measure of the amount of time a person has been a member of an organization, as compared to other members, and with an eye towards awarding privileges to those who have been members longer. 資歷一詞是指與其他成員相比，衡量一個人成為組織成員的時間長短，並著眼於向那些成為組織成員時間較長的人授予特權。
She felt a strange burning sensation in her eyes and decided to see a doctor. 她感到眼睛有一種奇怪的灼熱感。

sensational nerves 感覺神經
Something described as sensational is of or pertaining to sensation. 被描述為聳人聽聞的事物屬於或與感覺有關。

Common sense is essential for making sound decisions in life. 常識對於在生活中做出明智的決定至關重要。

meaning: 具有指定數量或種類的感官。
sentences: Humans are five- sensed beings, having touch, taste, sight, hearing, and smell. 人類是五種感覺生物，有觸覺、味覺、視覺、聽覺和嗅覺。 人類是五種感官生物，有觸覺、味覺、視覺、聽覺和嗅覺。 人類是五種感覺生物，有直覺、味覺、視覺、聽覺和嗅覺。
The report describes the result as sensed. 該報告描述了檢測到的結果。 該報告描述了檢測到的結果。 該報告描述了檢測的結果。

meaning: 沒有工作的感覺或慾望；被剝奪了感覺。
sentences: The blow to his head rendered him senseless; he didn’t awaken until he was in the ambulance. 頭部受到的打擊使他失去知覺。直到上了救護車他才醒過來。
The report describes the result as senseless. 報告稱這項結果毫無意義。

meaning: 對創造性表達或情感問題具有敏銳的敏感性；藝術或情感意識。
sentences: The term sensibility refers to keen sensitivity to matters of creative expression or feeling; artistic or emotional awareness. 敏感性一詞是指對創造性表達或感受的事物的敏銳敏感性；藝術或情感意識。
The lesson introduced sensibility as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了敏感性作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
It's sensible to save some money for the future and unexpected expenses. 為未來與意外支出存點錢是明智的。

She has very sensitive skin and needs to use special soap. 她皮膚非常敏感，需要使用特殊的肥皂。

The new sensor has a high level of sensitivity and can detect tiny vibrations. 新傳感器具有很高的靈敏度，可以檢測到微小的振動。
She is known for her sensitivity to the needs and feelings of others. 她以對他人需求和感受的敏感而聞名。
The automatic doors use a motion sensor to open when someone approaches. 自動門使用運動傳感器（感應器），當有人靠近時會自動打開。
The new car is equipped with various sensors to assist the driver with parking. 這輛新車配備了各種傳感器以輔助駕駛員停車。

meaning: 將神經衝動從感覺器官傳遞到神經中樞。
sentences: sensory neurons 感覺神經元
Something described as sensory is conveying nerve impulses from the sense organs to the nerve centers. 所謂感覺的東西是將神經衝動從感覺器官傳遞到神經中樞。

meaning: 屬於或關於身體感官的；感官的。
sentences: Plato believed that this sensual world in which we live is inferior to the heavenly realm. 柏拉圖認為，我們所處的這個感官世界低於天堂境界。
Something described as sensual is of or pertaining to the physical senses; sensory. 被描述為感性的東西是屬於或與身體感官有關的；感官的。
The painting captures the sensuality of human form. 這幅畫捕捉了人體的性感。
Her voice carried a quiet sensuality. 她的聲音帶著沉靜的性感。

meaning: 貨幣的細分，等於愛沙尼亞克朗的百分之一。
sentences: The term sent refers to a subdivision of currency, equal to one hundredth of an Estonian kroon. 發送一詞指的是貨幣的細分，等於愛沙尼亞克朗的百分之一。
The lesson introduced sent as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹的「發送」是一個易於理解的有用術語。
Could you please translate this English sentence into Chinese? 你能把這句英文句子翻譯成中文嗎？
The prisoner was given a ten-year sentence for his crimes. 該囚犯因其罪行被判處十年徒刑。
Consider fish, who are apparently sentient yet cognitively extremely primitive in comparison with humans. 以魚類為例，它們顯然具有感知能力，但與人類相比，其認知能力卻極為原始。

Obviously, other morally relevant considerations would apply to the case of a sentient fetus, as by acquiring sentience it acquires interests and moral status. 顯然，其他與道德相關的考慮因素也適用於有感知能力的胎兒，因為透過獲得感知能力，它獲得了利益和道德地位。
The public sentiment regarding the new policy is generally positive. 公眾對這項新政策的情緒（意見）總體上是積極的。
The letter was filled with warm sentiments and expressions of gratitude. 這封信充滿了溫慢的情感和感激之情。
She has a sentimental attachment to the old family home where she grew up. 她對自己成長的舊家有一種情感上的依戀。
He kept all the old letters for sentimental reasons, as they reminded him of his youth. 出於情感原因，他保留了所有舊信件，因為它們讓他想起了青春。

meaning: 電腦程式識別的唯一值，用於以特殊方式處理，或標記一組資料的結尾。
sentences: The xmp> tag is a sentinel that suspends web-page processing and displays the subsequent text literally xmp> 標籤是一個哨兵，它暫停網頁處理並按字面顯示後續文本

The term sentinel refers to a unique value recognised by a computer program for processing in a special way, or marking the end of a set of data. The term sentinel refers to a unique value recognised by a computer program for processing in a special way, or marking the end of a set of data.

meaning: 哨兵值班；當哨兵的時間。
sentences: The term sentry refers to sentry duty; time spent being a sentry. 哨兵一詞，指哨兵值班；當哨兵的時間。
The lesson introduced sentry as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「哨兵」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The two countries are separated by a high mountain range. 這兩個國家被一座高山脈隔開。
It's important to keep your personal life separate from work. 將個人生活與工作分開是很重要的。

meaning: 以單獨的方式；不在一起；分開。
sentences: We've been living separately for three years. 我們已經分居三年了。
Tackle the different parts of the climb separately before attempting the whole thing in one go. 在嘗試一次完成整個攀爬之前，先分別完成攀登的不同部分。
The two countries signed a treaty to ensure the separation of powers. 兩國簽署了一項條約以確保權力分立。
They decided to undergo a temporary separation to re-evaluate their relationship. 他們決定暫時分開，以重新評估他們的關係。

meaning: 以 政治上 、 合法 或<a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/wiki/ecmic 類型的方式對待社會成員。
sentences: Apartheid was a government-enforced form of separatism in which people received unequal social benefits based on race. 種族隔離是政府強制實施的一種 分離主義 形式，人們因種族而獲得不平等的社會福利。 Apartheid was a government-enforced form of separatism in which people received unequal social benefits based on race. 種族隔離是政府強制實施的一種 分離主義 形式，人們因種族而獲得不平等的社會福利。

The term separatism refers to The practice of treating members of different societal groups in a politically, legally, or economically different manner. 分離主義一詞是指以 政治上 、 合法 或 經濟 不同的方式對待不同社會群體的成員的做法方式。 分裂主義一詞是指以政治、法律或經濟上不同的方式對待不同社會群體成員的做法。 分離主義行動是指以政治上、合法或經濟上不同的方式對待不同社會群體成員的行為方式。

meaning: 主張或尋求將一個國家或地區分裂為兩個政治上獨立的國家或地區的人。
sentences: On rare occasions French-Canadian separatists have resorted to violence. 法裔加拿大分離主義者偶爾會訴諸暴力。

The term separatist refers to a person who advocates or seeks the splitting of one country or territory into two politically independent countries or territories. 分裂主義一詞是指主張或尋求將一個國家或地區分裂成兩個政治上獨立的國家或地區的人。

meaning: 來自共同祖先的氏族、部落或家庭；尤其是愛爾蘭古老的氏族之一。
sentences: The term sept refers to a clan, tribe, or family, proceeding from a common progenitor; especially, one of the ancient clans of Ireland. 「七」一詞指的是一個氏族、部落或家庭，源自於一個共同的祖先；尤其是愛爾蘭古老的氏族之一。
The lesson introduced sept as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 sept 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 屬於或關於污水或污水處理。
sentences: a septic system 化糞池系統
Something described as septic is of or pertaining to sewage or the disposal of sewage. 被描述為化糞池的東西是屬於或與污水或污水處理有關的東西。

meaning: 前面提到的事件之後發生的事件的統稱；後果。
sentences: The term sequel refers to the events, collectively, which follow a previously mentioned event; the aftermath. 「續集」一詞是指繼前面提到的事件之後發生的事件的統稱。後果。
The lesson introduced sequel as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「續集」作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The teacher asked the students to put the events of the story in the correct sequence. 老師要求學生按正確的順序排列故事中的事件。
A sequence of unexpected events led to the sudden change in the project plan. 一系列意外事件導致了專案計畫的突然變動。
Something described as sequential is succeeding or following in order. 被描述為連續的事物是按順序連續或跟隨的。
The word sequential is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「順序」一詞通常用於描述人、事物或情況。

meaning: 隔離的過程或行為；擱置或分開。
sentences: the sequestration of juries 陪審團的隔離
The term sequestration refers to The process or act of sequestering; a putting aside or separating. 術語「封存」是指封存的過程或行為；擱置或分離。
“Eine kleine Nachtmusik” is a well-known serenade written by Mozart. 《Eine kleine Nachtmusik》是莫札特創作的一首著名的小夜曲。
The term serenade refers to An instrumental composition in several movements. 小夜曲一詞是指由多個樂章組成的器樂作品。
She had a serene expression on her face as she sat quietly by the lake. 她安靜地坐在湖邊，臉上帶著安詳的表情。
The mountain village is a serene and peaceful place, away from the city. 那座山村是一個寧靜且安詳的地方，遠離了城市。
The term serenity refers to the state of being serene; calmness; peacefulness. 「寧靜」一詞是指平靜的狀態。冷靜；平靜。
The lesson introduced serenity as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「寧靜」這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 用這種布料製成的衣服。
sentences: The term serge refers to a garment made of this fabric. 術語「嗶嘰」是指由這種織物製成的服裝。
The lesson introduced serge as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了 serge 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The young sergeant led his platoon through the difficult mountain terrain. 那位年輕的中士帶領他的小隊穿過艱難的山區地形。
He was promoted to the rank of sergeant after years of excellent service. 在多年優秀服務後，他被晉升為中士（或警官）。
The police are searching for a serial killer who has committed several crimes. 警方正在搜尋一名犯下幾起罪案的連環（連續的）殺手。
The magazine features a serial story that is updated every single week. 雜誌刊登了一個每週更新的連載故事。
The television series about space exploration has been very popular this year. 關於太空探索的電視系列劇今年非常受歡迎。
The author published a series of books for children about animals and nature. 作者出版了一套關於動物和自然的兒童叢書（系列書籍）。
The doctor said that her condition is serious but stable. 醫生說她的情況很嚴重但很穩定。
You should take this matter more seriously; it's very important. 你應該更認真地對待這件事，它非常重要。

meaning: 以極端或主要的方式；主要是。
sentences: Unless you're seriously strapped (armed), you're about to be not okay too. 除非你嚴重束縛（武裝），否則你也不會好起來的。
If someone acts seriously, they do so in a way that is in an extreme or major way; majorly. 如果某人的行為是嚴肅的，那麼他們的行為方式就是極端的或主要的；主要是。
The priest gave a powerful sermon on the importance of peace and kindness. 牧師發表了一場關於和平與善良重要性的強有力佈道。
Stop giving me a sermon about my mistakes; I already know I was wrong. 別再為我的錯誤對我說教（講道）了；我已經知道我錯了。

meaning: 蛇，尤其是大型或危險的蛇。
sentences: The term serpent refers to a snake, especially a large or dangerous one. 蛇一詞指的是蛇，尤其是大型或危險的蛇。
The lesson introduced serpent as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了蛇作為一個有用的術語來理解。
The serpentine path through the mountains was narrow and dangerous. 山間蜿蜒的小路狹窄而危險。
Something described as serpentine is curving in alternate directions; sinuous. 被描述為蛇形的東西正在向不同的方向彎曲；蜿蜒的。

meaning: 像鋸子一樣刻痕或切割。
sentences: That knife has a serrated blade. 那把刀有鋸齒狀刀片。
The report describes the result as serrated. 報告將結果描述為鋸齒狀。

meaning: 某些其他動物體液的含水部分，例如牛奶；乳清。
sentences: The term serum refers to the watery portion of certain other animal fluids, such as milk; whey. 血清一詞是指某些其他動物液體的水狀部分，例如牛奶；乳清。
The lesson introduced serum as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了血清作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The wealthy family employed several servants to manage the house. 這個富裕家庭雇用了幾名僕人來管理家務。
Public servants play a vital role in serving the local community. 公務員在服務當地社區方面發揮著至關重要的作用。
The restaurant serves a wide variety of delicious Italian dishes. 這家餐廳供應多樣化且美味的義大利菜。
He served in the army for three years before starting university. 他在大學開始前在軍中服役了三年。
The company's central server crashed this morning, causing a temporary outage. 公司的中央伺服器今天早上當機，導致暫時停電。
The waiter worked as a server at a luxury restaurant in the city center. 那名服務生在市中心的一家豪華餐廳擔任侍者。
The hotel provides excellent service to all its guests. 這間飯店為所有客人提供優質的服務。
Our car needs a full service before our long road trip. 我們的車在長途旅行前需要全面保養。
The recipe provides enough ingredients for four servings of the dish. 該食譜提供的食材足夠做四份這道菜。
She is currently serving as the senior manager of the local research team. 她目前擔任當地研究團隊的高級經理。
Sesame seeds are a popular topping for bread and rolls. 芝麻是麵包常用的配料。
She added some toasted sesame seeds to the salad. 她在沙拉中加了一些烤芝麻。
The final session of the international summit will focus on climate change. 國際峰會的最後一次會議將聚焦於氣候變遷。
The students attended a three-hour training session on new software techniques. 學生們參加了為期三小時的新軟體技術培訓課程（一段時間）。
Please set the table for dinner; the guests will arrive soon. 請擺好餐具準備吃晚餐，客人很快就到了。
The sun sets in the west and rises in the east. 太陽從西方落下，從東方升起。
The project experienced a major setback when the manager decided to resign. 當經理決定辭職時，專案遭遇了重大挫折。
We must learn to overcome setbacks and continue to pursue our future goals. 我們必須學會克服阻礙（挫折）並繼續追求未來目標。

meaning: 設定某事的人，例如挑戰或考試。
sentences: The exam was so hard we assumed the question setter must have been in a bad mood. 考試太難了，我們猜想題者一定心情不好。
The setter of this crossword has been known to throw us all for a loop occasionally. 眾所周知，這個填字遊戲的設定者偶爾會讓我們所有人陷入困境。
The novel is located in a beautiful rural setting in the south of France. 這部小說的背景設定在法國南部美麗的農村環境中。
You can adjust the brightness and contrast in the display settings of your laptop. 您可以在筆電的顯示設定中調整亮度和對比度。
They managed to settle the dispute without going to court. 他們成功解決了糾紛而沒有對簿公堂。
They decided to settle in a small village near the coast. 他們決定在沿海的一個小村莊裡定居。
They finally decided to settle in a quiet small town in the country. 他們最終決定定居在鄉下一個安靜的小鎮。
The two companies reached a legal settlement out of court. 這兩家公司在庭外達成了法律和解。

meaning: 舒適、自在，尤其是在經歷了一段變化或動盪的時期之後。
sentences: It took me a while to feel settled after I moved to this big city. 搬到這座大城市後，我花了一段時間才感到安定下來。
The report describes the result as settled. 報告將結果描述為已解決。
settlement of debt 債務清償
The term settlement refers to the act of settling. 結算一詞是指結算行為。
The first settlers arrived in the new land and built small wooden cabins. 第一批定居者抵達這片新土地，並建造了小木屋。
The history museum tells the story of early European settlers in Australia. 這座歷史博物館講述了早期歐洲定居者在澳洲的故事。

meaning: 為特定目的而設計的設備；一個裝置。
sentences: The laboratory included an elaborate setup for measuring the energy. 該實驗室包括一個用於測量能量的複雜裝置。
The term setup refers to equipment designed for a particular purpose; an apparatus. 術語「設定」是指為特定目的而設計的設備；一個裝置。
There are seven days in a week. 一週有七天。
The child is seven years old today. 這孩子今天七歲了。
Something described as seventeenth is the ordinal form of the number seventeen. 被描述為第十七的是數字十七的序數形式。
The word seventeenth is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 第十七這個字常用來形容人、事或情況。
Something described as seventh is the ordinal form of the number seven. 被描述為第七的東西是數字七的序數形式。
The word seventh is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 第七這個字常用來形容人、事或情況。
After he graduated, he severed all links to his family. 畢業後，他斷絕了與家人的一切連結。
to sever the head from the body 把頭從身體上割下來
I have visited Japan several times and I love the culture. 我去過日本好幾次，我很喜歡當地的文化。
There are several different ways to solve this difficult problem. 有幾種不同的方法可以解決這個難題。

meaning: 切斷行為或被切斷的狀態。
sentences: The term severance refers to the act of severing or the state of being severed. 術語「切斷」是指切斷的行為或被切斷的狀態。
The lesson introduced severance as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了遣散費作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The region experienced a severe drought that lasted for several months. 該地區經歷了持續數月的嚴重乾旱。
He received severe injuries in the car accident and was rushed to the hospital. 他在車禍中受了重傷（劇烈的傷害），被緊急送往醫院。

meaning: 嚴重地、嚴厲地。可用來形容受傷、損害、批評或天氣等程度非常強烈。
sentences: The storm severely damaged several houses near the coast. 暴風雨嚴重破壞了海岸附近的幾棟房子。
She was severely criticized for ignoring the safety rules. 她因忽視安全規則而受到嚴厲批評。

meaning: 不良事物的程度；惡劣或嚴重。
sentences: The severity of the offence merits a long prison sentence. 罪行嚴重，值得判處長期監禁。
The term severity refers to the degree of something undesirable; badness or seriousness. 「嚴重性」一詞是指某些事情不受歡迎的程度；壞事或嚴重性。
My mother taught me how to sew a button back onto a shirt when I was young. 我小時候母親教我如何把扣子縫回襯衫上。
She spent the afternoon sewing a beautiful new dress for her daughter's birthday. 她花了一個下午為女兒的生日縫製一件漂亮的新洋裝。

meaning: 水和固體廢棄物的懸浮液，透過下水道運輸進行處理或處理。
sentences: Untreated sewage can pollute rivers. 未經處理的污水會污染河川。
The city invested in a modern sewage system. 該市投資建造了現代化的污水處理系統。

meaning: 管道或渠道，或管道或渠道系統，用於清除人類排泄物並提供排水。
sentences: There was a blockage in the sewer after an item of clothing was flushed down the toilet. 一件衣服被沖進馬桶後，下水道堵塞了。
The term sewer refers to a pipe or channel, or system of pipes or channels, used to remove human waste and to provide drainage. 下水道一詞是指用於清除人類排泄物並提供排水的管道或通道，或管道或通道系統。

meaning: 正在或已經被縫製的東西。
sentences: She put down her sewing and went to answer the door. 她放下針線活去開門。
The sewing has come undone on this seam. 這條接縫處的縫線已鬆開。
The application form asks for your name, age, and sex. 申請表要求填寫您的姓名、年齡與性別。
Gender equality means that both sexes should have equal rights. 性別平等意味著男女雙方都應享有平等的權利。

meaning: 照顧教堂建築及其墓地並可能擔任掘墓人和敲鐘人的教堂官員。
sentences: The term sexton refers to a church official who looks after a church building and its graveyard and may act as a gravedigger and bell ringer. 司事一詞指的是照顧教堂建築及其墓地的教會官員，並可能充當掘墓人和敲鐘人。
The lesson introduced sexton as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了塞克斯頓這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
Education plays a vital role in preventing sexual discrimination in society. 教育在預防社會性別歧視方面發揮著至關重要的作用。
Biological researchers are studying the sexual reproduction of exotic plants. 生物研究人員正研究外來植物的有性生殖。

meaning: 性的品質；以性別為特徵或區分的事物。
sentences: The term sexuality refers to the quality of being sexual; that which is characterized or distinguished by sex. 性這個詞是指性的品質。以性別為特徵或區分的事物。
The lesson introduced sexuality as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了性這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
She kissed him sexually. 她性地吻了他。
If someone acts sexually, they do so in a way that is in a sexual manner; erotically. 如果某人有性行為，他們的行為方式就是性行為；色情地。
She wore a stunning red dress that made her look very sexy and elegant. 她穿了一件讓她看起來既性感又優雅的亮麗紅洋裝。
The new perfume has a very sophisticated and sexy scent. 這款新香水有一種非常精緻且迷人的香味。
The homeless man was wearing a shabby old coat and worn-out shoes. 那名無家可歸的人穿著一件破舊的大衣和磨損的鞋子。
I found his behavior towards his colleagues to be rather shabby and unkind. 我發現他對同事的行為相當卑鄙（不厚道）且不友善。

meaning: 居住（居住或與之一起生活）；窩棚。
sentences: To shack means to live (in or with); to shack up. 棚屋意味著居住（居住在其中或與之一起居住）；窩棚。
People may shack in different situations depending on the context. 根據具體情況，人們可能會在不同的情況下搭棚。
We practiced using shaddock in two different sentences. 我們練習把 shaddock 放進兩個不同句子裡。
We discussed the term shaddock in class today. 我們今天在課堂上討論了 shaddock 這個詞。
We sat in the shade of a large oak tree to escape the hot afternoon sun. 我們坐在巨大的橡樹蔭下，以躲避午後炎熱的陽光。
The curtains come in many different shades of blue, from pale to deep. 這些窗簾有許多不同深淺（色調）的藍色，從淺藍到深藍都有。

meaning: 某物被遮蔽的行為或結果。
sentences: the delicate shadings of colour in the painted sunset 所描繪的夕陽中微妙的色彩陰影
The term shading refers to The act or result of something being shaded. 術語「陰影」是指某物被陰影的行為或結果。
The long shadows cast by the setting sun stretched across the garden. 落日投下的長長陰影橫跨了整個花園。
The mountain was shrouded in shadow as the moon rose in the sky. 當月亮升起時，大山籠罩在陰影之中。

meaning: 被遮蔽的效果（在阻擋的意義上），如來自光源或無線電傳輸。
sentences: The term shadowing refers to The effect of being shadowed (in the sense of blocked), as from a light source or radio transmission. 術語「陰影」是指被陰影（在阻擋的意義上）的效果，如來自光源或無線電傳輸。
We learned the meaning of shadowing during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了影子的意義。
He sat in a shadowy corner. 他坐在陰暗的角落。
Something described as shadowy is in shadow; darkened by shadows. 被描述為陰暗的東西是在陰影中；被陰影變暗。

meaning: 陰涼的、可疑的、不正當的
sentences: They enjoyed a pleasant walk along the shady paths of the park. 他們在公園陰涼的小徑上愉快地散步。
I wouldn't trust him; he's involved in some shady business deals lately. 我不會信任他，他最近參與了一些不正當（可疑）的商業交易。

meaning: 他媽的；造成傷害，特別是透過欺騙或背叛。
sentences: Your boss really shafted you by stealing your idea like that. 你的老闆這樣竊取你的想法確實是在欺騙你。
To shaft means to fuck over; to cause harm to, especially through deceit or treachery. To shake 的意思是操弄；造成傷害，特別是透過欺騙或背叛。

meaning: 無光澤的材質；粗糙的毛髮、纖維等。
sentences: The term shag refers to matted material; rough massed hair, fibres etc. 術語「粗毛」指的是纏結的材料；粗糙的毛髮、纖維等
The lesson introduced shag as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了 shag 作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The term shah refers to a king of Persia or Iran. 沙赫一詞指的是波斯或伊朗的國王。
The lesson introduced shah as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「shah」這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The two leaders shook hands at the beginning of the meeting. 兩位領導人在會議開始時握手。
The ground began to shake during the sudden earthquake. 地面在突如其來的地震中開始搖晃。

meaning: 主要指一個人的：一個人的鎮靜或信心被打亂或心煩意亂；處於休克或創傷狀態。
sentences: We were left shaken by the revelations of abuse. 我們對虐待行為的揭露感到震驚。
Something described as shaken is chiefly of a person: having had one's composure or confidence disrupted or upset; in a state of shock or trauma. 被描述為動搖的東西主要是針對一個人的：一個人的鎮靜或信心被破壞或不安；處於休克或創傷狀態。

meaning: 搖動的人或物，或透過其搖動某物。
sentences: The term shaker refers to a person or thing that shakes, or by means of which something is shaken. 搖動者一詞指的是搖動的人或物，或透過其搖動某物。
The lesson introduced shaker as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了振動器這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 充滿搖晃或裂痕；破裂的。
sentences: shaky timber 搖搖欲墜的木材
Something described as shaky is full of shakes or cracks; cracked. 被描述為搖晃的東西充滿了搖晃或裂縫；破裂了。

meaning: 殼、鱗片或外殼；鱈魚或豆莢。
sentences: The term shale refers to a shell, scale or husk; a cod or pod. 頁岩一詞是指殼、鱗片或外殼；鱈魚或豆莢。
The lesson introduced shale as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了頁岩這個易於理解的有用術語。
Shall we go for a walk in the park after dinner? 我們晚餐後去公園散散步好嗎？
The company shall be responsible for any damages incurred. 公司應對所產生的任何損害負責。
The children were happily playing in the shallow water near the beach. 孩子們正開心地在海灘附近的淺水區玩耍。
He has a very shallow understanding of the complex political situation. 他對複雜政治局面的理解非常膚淺（淺）。
The children were playing in the shallows of the river. 孩子們在河流的淺灘處玩耍。
Be careful not to run your boat into the shallows. 小心別把船開進淺水區。

meaning: 第二人稱單數一般現在式指示“shall”。
sentences: Thou shalt not kill. 你不可殺人。
To shalt means to second-person singular simple present indicative of shall. To shalt 表示第二人稱單數現在時，表示「shall」。

meaning: 假貨；聲稱是正品的仿製品。
sentences: The time-share deal was a sham. 分時度假交易是一場騙局。
The term sham refers to a fake; an imitation that purports to be genuine. 「sham」一詞指的是假貨；聲稱是真品的仿製品。
The term shaman refers to a traditional faith healer. 薩滿一詞指的是傳統的信仰治療師。
The lesson introduced shaman as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了薩滿作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
It's a great shame that the historical building was destroyed. 那棟歷史建築被摧毀真是太可惜了。
He felt a deep sense of shame for his dishonest behavior. 他對自己不誠實的行為感到深深的羞愧。
It is shameful that so many children in the world are still suffering from hunger. 世界上仍有這麼多孩子在遭受飢餓之苦，這真是可恥（丟臉）。
He felt that his behavior at the party last night was truly shameful and apologized. 他覺得自己昨晚在派對上的行為真的很丟臉，並道了歉。
I need to buy a new bottle of organic shampoo for my dry hair. 我需要買一瓶新的有機洗髮精來護理我乾燥的頭髮。
She washed her hair with a fragrant herbal shampoo this morning. 她今早用一種芳香的草本洗髮精洗了頭。

meaning: 幾種小型三葉草狀植物的任何一種，具有三葉形葉子，尤其是白三葉草。
sentences: The fields were covered with shamrocks. 田野上長滿了三葉草。
The term shamrock refers to Any of several species of small clover-like plant species, with trefoil leaves, especially Trifolium repens. 三葉草一詞是指幾種小型三葉草狀植物物種中的任何一種，具有三葉形葉子，尤其是白三葉草。
Here man! that's pure shan that like 在這裡，夥計！那是純粹的山，喜歡
Something described as shan is unfair, harsh. 形容為「山」的東西是不公平的、嚴酷的。

meaning: 徵用、劫持或以其他方式（通常是錯誤地）侵占某個地方或事物。
sentences: Let's see if we can shanghai a room for a couple of hours. 我們看看能否在上海租房間幾個小時。
To shanghai means to commandeer, hijack, or otherwise (usually wrongfully) appropriate a place or thing. 到上海意味著徵用、劫持或以其他方式（通常是錯誤地）侵占某個地方或事物。

meaning: 物體的突出部分，可以透過它來附著。
sentences: This twist drill has a reduced shank so that it can be used even in a small chuck. 此麻花鑽具有縮徑柄，因此即使在小卡盤中也可以使用。
The term shank refers to A protruding part of an object, by which it is or can be attached. 術語「柄」是指物體的突出部分，物體可以透過這個突出部分連接。
The instructions were shanty, so everyone finished quickly. 說明很shanty，所以大家很快就完成了。
Mia gave a shanty answer during the meeting. Mia在會議中給出了一個很shanty的回答。
The cloud has a very strange shape, almost like a dragon. 那朵雲的形狀非常奇怪，幾乎像一條龍。
Regular exercise is a great way to stay in good shape. 定期運動是保持良好體態的好方法。

meaning: 已被賦予形狀，尤其是彎曲形狀。
sentences: The shaped sides of the wardrobe give it a more attractive appearance. 衣櫃側面的形狀使其外觀更具吸引力。
The report describes the result as shaped. 報告描述了結果。
It's important to learn how to share your toys with others. 學習如何與他人分享玩具是很重要的。
They decided to share the cost of the trip equally. 他們決定平均分擔旅行費用。
The company's annual general meeting was attended by hundreds of shareholders. 公司的年度股東大會有數百名股東參加。
The shareholders voted in favor of the proposed merger with the competitor. 股東們投票贊成擬議中的與競爭對手的合併。
The great white shark is one of the most powerful ocean predators. 大白鯊是海洋中最強大的捕食者之一。
We saw several small sharks swimming in the tropical aquarium. 我們在熱帶水族館看到幾隻小鯊魚在游動。
Be careful with that knife; it has a very sharp blade. 小心那把刀，它的刀刃非常鋒利。
The meeting will start at 9:00 a.m. sharp tomorrow morning. 會議將在明天早上九點準時開始。
I need to sharpen my pencil before I can start drawing the building model. 我得先削尖鉛筆，然後才能開始畫建築模型。
Traveling and learning about other cultures can help to sharpen your mind. 旅遊和了解其他文化有助於提高（磨練）你的思維。

meaning: 騙子；一個騙子；以作弊為生的職業賭徒。
sentences: The term sharper refers to a swindler; a cheat; a professional gambler who makes his living by cheating. 夏普一詞指的是騙子；一個騙子；以作弊為生的職業賭徒。
The lesson introduced sharper as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 Sharper 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 以強烈區分或區分的方式；敏銳地。
sentences: The wealth of this small country contrasts sharply with that of its neighbours. 這個小國的財富與其鄰國形成鮮明對比。
If someone acts sharply, they do so in a way that is in a strongly distinguishing or differentiating manner; acutely. 如果某人行為尖銳，那麼他們會以一種強烈區分或差異化的方式這樣做；尖銳地。
The glass window shattered into a thousand pieces when hit by the ball. 玻璃窗被球擊中後碎成（粉碎）了無數碎片。
Her dreams of becoming a professional dancer were shattered by the injury. 她成為專業舞者的夢想因傷破滅了。
He usually shaves every morning before going to work to look neat. 他通常每天早上上班前都會刮鬍子，讓自己看起來整潔。
The car nearly hit the cyclist, but luckily it only gave him a close shave. 那輛車差點撞上騎自行車的人，幸運的是只是擦身而過（虛驚一場）。
He bought a new electric shaver at the local department store yesterday. 他昨天在當地百貨公司買了一個新的電動刮鬍刀。
The store sells a variety of high-quality shavers and accessories for men. 商店出售各式各樣的高品質男性刮鬍刀及其配件。

meaning: 灌木叢；小樹林或小樹林。
sentences: The term shaw refers to a thicket; a small wood or grove. 「shaw」一詞指的是灌木叢。小樹林或小樹林。
The lesson introduced shaw as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「shaw」這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。
She wore a warm wool shawl over her shoulders. 她肩上披著一條暖和的羊毛披肩。
My grandmother knitted this beautiful silk shawl for me. 我祖母為我織了這條漂亮的絲綢披肩。
We practiced using she in two different sentences. 我們練習把 she 放進兩個不同句子裡。
The coach wrote down she with the note "她". 教練把 she 記下來，並註記「她」。
She is a very talented artist who paints beautiful landscapes. 她是一位非常有才華的藝術家，畫出的風景畫非常漂亮。
She did all the work by herself without any help. 她沒有任何幫助，獨自完成了所有工作。

meaning: 這種樹的果實，有一層薄薄的、酸的、營養豐富的果肉，包裹著相對較大、富含油的種子。
sentences: The term shea refers to the fruit of this tree, having a thin, tart, nutritious pulp that surrounds a relatively large, oil-rich seed. 乳木果一詞指的是這種樹的果實，具有薄而酸、營養豐富的果肉，包裹著相對較大、富含油脂的種子。
The lesson introduced shea as a useful term to understand. 本课程介绍了乳木果作为一个易于理解的有用术语。

meaning: 透過修剪從（綿羊、美洲駝等）身上除去羊毛。
sentences: shear the llamas 給美洲駝剪毛
To shear means to remove the fleece from (a sheep, llama, etc.) by clipping. 剪毛是指透過修剪從（綿羊、美洲駝等）身上剪下羊毛。
the whole shearing of a flock; the shearings from cloth 整個羊群的剪毛；剪下來的布
The term shearing refers to The material cut off in this way. 術語剪切是指以這種方式切斷材料。
The gardener used a pair of garden shears to trim the hedge. 園丁用一把大剪刀修剪樹籬。
He is using the shears to cut the thick cardboard. 他正用大剪刀裁剪厚紙板。
The term sheath refers to a holster for a sword; a scabbard. 術語「鞘」是指劍的皮套；刀鞘。
The lesson introduced sheath as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了鞘作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
He keeps all his gardening tools and equipment in a small wooden shed. 他把所有的園藝工具和設備都放在一個小木棚裡。
The snake began to shed its skin as it grew larger during the spring. 春天蛇長大時開始脫（蛻）皮。
The polished floor had a beautiful golden sheen. 拋光過的地板有著漂亮的金色光澤。
Her hair had a healthy sheen after using the new shampoo. 使用新洗髮精後，她的頭髮有著健康的光彩。
The sheep were peacefully grazing in the green fields. 羊群正在綠油油的田野裡平靜地吃草。
Australia is famous for its large number of sheep and wool. 澳洲以其大量的羊和羊毛聞名。
Winning the championship was a moment of sheer joy and excitement for the team. 贏得冠軍對全隊來說是純粹的快樂與興奮時刻。
The mountain climbers had to scale a sheer cliff to reach the top. 登山者必須攀登陡峭的懸崖才能到達山頂。
She put a clean white cotton sheet on the guest bed. 她在客房床上鋪了一條乾淨的白色棉質床單。
Please write your answers on the separate sheet of paper provided. 請將答案寫在提供的另一張紙上。

meaning: 阿拉伯 村莊、家庭或小 Fel/unad)/adin/adm/adin"m">Lunad/iadin"​​oadm/adm/adinadm">Lall/iadin"m; title="Arab">領袖 。
sentences: The term sheik refers to The leader of an Arab village, family or small tribe. 酋長一詞指 領導者 ， 阿拉伯 村莊、家庭或小 阿拉伯 村莊、家庭或小 阿拉伯 部落或小 。 酋長一詞指的是阿拉伯村莊、家庭或小部落的領袖。 酋長指領導者，阿拉伯村莊、家庭或小阿拉伯村莊、家庭或小阿拉伯部落或小。
The lesson introduced sheik as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 sheik，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。 本課程介紹了 sheik，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。 本課程介紹了酋長，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
He placed the new book on the top shelf of the bookcase. 他把新書放在書架的最頂層。
There are several bottles of fresh milk on the refrigerator shelf. 冰箱架上有幾瓶鮮奶。
The children were happily collecting colorful seashells on the beach. 孩子們正在海灘上開心地收集彩色貝殼。
Turtles have a hard outer shell that protects their soft bodies. 烏龜有堅硬的外殼來保護它們柔軟的身體。
the shelled slug of species Testacella haliotidea Testacella haliotidea 種的帶殼蛞蝓
The report describes the result as shelled. 報告將結果描述為“炮轟”。
The term shelling refers to An artillery bombardment. 砲擊一詞指的是砲擊。
We learned the meaning of shelling during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了砲擊的含義。
a shelly beach 貝殼海灘
Something described as shelly is abounding with shells. 被描述為“shelly”的東西是指充滿貝殼的東西。
The homeless people found shelter in a nearby church during the snowstorm. 在暴風雪期間，無家可歸的人在附近的教堂找到了避難所。
They used large leaves to provide shelter from the sudden heavy rain. 他們用大葉子來遮擋突如其來的暴雨。

meaning: 受到保護，例如免受風或天氣的影響。
sentences: The boat was much safer, during the storm, in the sheltered cove. 暴風雨期間，船停在避風的海灣裡要安全得多。
The report describes the result as sheltered. 報告將結果描述為受到保護。
The term shelving refers to The side- rails of a cart or waggon. 術語“貨架”是指手推車或貨車的側欄。
We learned the meaning of shelving during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了擱置的含義。
The dedicated shepherd guided his flock of sheep to the green meadow. 盡責的牧羊人帶領他的羊群前往綠色草地。
In the past, many young men in this region worked as shepherds. 在過去，這個地區的許多青年男子擔任牧羊人。
The local sheriff is responsible for law enforcement in the small community. 當地警長負責小社區的執法工作。
He was appointed as the sheriff of the county earlier this year. 他在今年年初被任命為該縣的治安官（警長）。

meaning: Sherlock 的替代字母大小寫形式。
sentences: To sherlock means to alternative letter-case form of Sherlock. To sherlock 是指 Sherlock 的替代字母大小寫形式。
People may sherlock in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同的情況下進行夏洛克。
Would you like a glass of dry sherry before dinner? 你想來杯餐前乾雪莉酒嗎？
She added a splash of sherry to the soup for extra flavor. 她在湯裡加了一點雪莉酒以增加風味。
The knight carried a heavy iron shield to protect himself in battle. 騎士提著沈重的鐵盾在戰鬥中保護自己。
Parents always try to shield their children from unnecessary stress and harm. 父母總是試圖保護（遮擋）孩子免受不必要的壓力和傷害。
There has been a significant shift in public opinion regarding the new policy. 大眾對新政策的看法發生了顯著的轉變（改變）。
He works the night shift at the factory and sleeps during the day. 他在工廠值大夜班，白天睡覺。
The term shifter refers to someone who plays tricks; a trickster. 「變態者」這個詞指的是那些玩弄詭計的人。一個騙子。
The lesson introduced shifter as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「移位器」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 肯尼亞 、 索馬利亞 、 烏幹達 。
sentences: The term shilling refers to The currency of Kenya, Somalia, Tanzania and Uganda. 先令一詞指的是 肯尼亞 、 索馬利亞 、 烏幹達 。 先令一詞是指肯亞、索馬利亞、坦尚尼亞和烏幹達的貨幣。 先令指的是肯亞、索馬利亞、烏幹達。
The lesson introduced shilling as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了先令這個易於理解的有用術語。 本課介紹了先令這個易於理解的有用術語。 本課先介紹了這個易於理解的有用術語。
He kicked the ball and accidentally hurt his shin. 他踢球時不小心弄傷了脛部。
The player was wearing shin guards for protection. 球員佩戴著護脛以進行保護。
The morning sun shone brightly through the bedroom window. 早晨的陽光透過臥室窗戶明亮地照進來。
He used a soft cloth to shine his leather shoes for the interview. 他用軟布把皮鞋擦亮以備面試。
He polished his leather shoes until they were clean and shiny. 他把皮鞋擦得乾乾淨淨、閃閃發亮。
The little girl was delighted with her new pair of shiny red shoes. 小女孩對她的新亮紅鞋感到非常高興。
The huge cruise ship sailed across the Atlantic Ocean. 巨大的郵輪航行橫跨了大西洋。
We need to ship these products to our customers by Friday. 我們需要在週五前將這些產品運送給客戶。

meaning: 透過任何方式運輸的貨物（不僅僅是透過船舶）。
sentences: We're expecting another shipment of oranges tomorrow. 我們預計明天會有另一批橙子。
The term shipment refers to a load of goods that is transported by any method (not just by ship). 裝運一詞是指以任何方式（而不僅僅是透過船舶）運輸的一批貨物。

meaning: 在船舶或其他交通工具上，作為貨物的一部分。
sentences: The company will not be responsible for the loss of shipped goods in transit. 本公司將不負責運送貨物在運輸途中的損失。
The report describes the result as shipped. 該報告描述了已發貨的結果。

meaning: 運送（發送）某物的個人或組織。
sentences: The shipper should have paid for insurance on the package, because it was damaged when it arrived. 托運人應該為包裹支付保險，因為包裹到達時已損壞。
The term shipper refers to The person or organization that ships (sends) something. 托運人一詞是指運送（發送）某物的個人或組織。

meaning: 使用郵政或承運服務發送物品或包裹的費用。
sentences: The shipping is included in the quoted price. 運費包含在報價中。
The term shipping refers to The cost of sending an item or package using postal or carrier services. 運輸一詞是指使用郵政或承運人服務發送物品或包裹的費用。

meaning: 沉沒或擱淺而不再適合航行的船舶；毀壞的船隻或其遺骸。
sentences: The term shipwreck refers to a ship that has sunk or run aground so that it is no longer seaworthy; a ruined vessel or its remains. 沉船一詞是指沉沒或擱淺而不再適合航行的船舶；毀壞的船隻或其遺骸。
The lesson introduced shipwreck as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了沉船這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 建造和修理船舶的地方。
sentences: The term shipyard refers to a place where ships are built and repaired. 造船廠一詞是指建造和修理船舶的地方。
The lesson introduced shipyard as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了造船廠這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 一個人來自或居住的一般區域。
sentences: When are you coming back to the shire? 你什麼時候回郡？
The term shire refers to the general area in which a person comes from or lives. 郡一詞指的是一個人來自或居住的一般區域。
He wore a clean white shirt and a blue tie for the interview. 他穿了一件乾淨的白襯衫並繫上藍領帶去面試。
The buttons on my shirt are loose; I need to sew them on. 我襯衫上的扣子鬆了，我需要把它們縫好。

meaning: 一把刀，尤其是用通常不用作武器的東西（如塑膠湯匙或牙刷）製成的臨時刀。
sentences: The term shiv refers to a knife, especially a makeshift one fashioned from something not normally used as a weapon (like a plastic spoon or a toothbrush). shiv一詞指的是一把刀，尤其是用通常不用作武器的東西（如塑膠湯匙或牙刷）製成的臨時刀。
The lesson introduced shiv as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 shiv 作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
She began to shiver with cold after being outside in the snow for hours. 在雪地待了幾小時後，她開始因冷而發抖（打冷顫）。
The ghost story sent a shiver down his spine and filled him with fear. 鬼故事讓他感到背脊發涼（打冷顫），充滿恐懼。
We saw a large shoal of colorful fish in the ocean. 我們在海洋中看到一大群色彩繽紛的魚。

The sudden news of his resignation was a big shock to everyone. 他突然辭職的消息對每個人來說都是個巨大的震驚。

meaning: 一個令人震驚或震驚的人或物。
sentences: The election results were a real shocker. 選舉結果確實令人震驚。
The term shocker refers to one who or that which shocks or startles. 震驚者一詞指的是令人震驚或驚嚇的人或物。
He had thinned shockingly, losing 100 pounds in the last month of his illness. 他瘦得驚人，在生病的最後一個月裡體重減輕了 100 磅。
If someone acts shockingly, they do so in a way that is in a shocking manner. 如果某人的行為令人震驚，那麼他們會以令人震驚的方式這樣做。
Do not settle for shoddy knives if you are serious about cooking. 如果您認真對待烹飪，請不要選擇劣質刀具。
The report describes the result as shoddy. 報告稱這一結果是劣質的。
She bought a beautiful pair of black shoes at the mall. 她在購物中心買了一雙漂亮的黑鞋。
Please take off your shoes before entering the house. 進屋前請脫鞋。
Please take off your shoes before you enter the house. 進入屋內前請先脫鞋。
I need to buy a new pair of running shoes for my training. 我需要為我的訓練買一雙新的慢跑鞋。
The term shoemaker refers to a person who makes shoes. 鞋匠一詞指的是製作鞋子的人。
The lesson introduced shoemaker as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「鞋匠」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

See if you can shoo off the insurance salesmen. 看看你能不能趕走保險推銷員。

meaning: 情緒不安或不安；害怕的。
sentences: Crystal was shook when Mr. Wu discovered she was shopping online for panties and bras to pass the time in class. 當吳先生發現她在網上購買內褲和胸罩以打發課堂時間時，克里斯特爾感到震驚。

meaning: 射擊某物的人；槍手、弓箭手等。
sentences: The shooter put a bullet clean through her head. 槍手將子彈直接射穿了她的頭部。
The term shooter refers to someone who shoots something; a gunner, archer, etc. 射手一詞指的是射擊某物的人；槍手、弓箭手等

meaning: 包含當地商店等廣告的免費當地報紙；有時包括折扣券。
sentences: The term shopper refers to a free local newspaper containing advertisements for local shops etc; sometimes includes discount coupons. 「購物者」一詞是指包含當地商店等廣告的免費當地報紙；有時包括折扣券。

meaning: 購買商品或服務，或尋找適合購買的商品或服務的過程。
sentences: On Saturdays we usually do the shopping. 星期六我們通常去購物。

meaning: 空頭、賣空者：從事賣空活動的人。

sentences: Due to a shortfall in revenue, we will have to make some cuts. 由於收入不足，我們將不得不進行一些削減。

meaning: 任何簡短或簡短的說話或做某事的方式。

meaning: 在實體店檢查商品，然後從網上商家購買相同的產品；使用實體店作為在線商家的陳列室。

meaning: 以簡化概念或問題的方式，從而失去其細微差別和複雜性或忽略重要細節。

The word simplistic is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 簡化這個詞經常用來描述一個人、一件事或一種情況。
I simply don't have enough time to finish all the work today. 我純粹是今天沒有足夠的時間完成所有工作。
The solution to the problem is simply to work harder and smarter. 解決問題的方法純粹就是更努力、更聰明地工作。

meaning: 建模、複製、複製行為、外觀或屬性。
