a poor skier 一個貧窮的滑雪者
Learning a new language is a great way to acquire valuable skills. 學習一門新語言是獲得寶貴技能的一種好方法。
She has excellent computer skills and can use various programs. 她擁有出色的電腦技能，會使用各種程式。
The factory employs many highly skilled and experienced workers. 該工廠雇用了許多技術精湛且經驗豐富的工人。
He is a very skilled surgeon who has performed many operations. 他是一位技術非常精湛的外科醫生，做過許多手術。

meaning: 用於煎炸的平底鍋，通常又大又重。
sentences: Heat some oil in a cast-iron skillet and add the onions. 在鑄鐵煎鍋中加熱一些油，然後加入洋蔥。
The term skillet refers to a pan for frying, generally large and heavy. 煎鍋一詞是指用於煎炸的平底鍋，通常又大又重。
She is a very skillful pianist who has performed worldwide. 她是一位非常有技巧、曾在世界各地演出的鋼琴家。
The task requires a highly skillful hand and extreme patience. 這項任務需要非常靈巧的手以及極大的耐心。
She decided to skim through the report to get a general idea of the data. 她決定瀏覽一下報告，以便對數據有個大概了解。
He managed to skim the stone across the calm surface of the mountain lake. 他成功地讓石子在平靜的山湖水面上滑過（打水漂）。
She has very sensitive skin and needs to use special moisturizers. 她皮膚非常敏感，需要使用特殊的保濕霜。
The doctor checked the mole on his skin to ensure it wasn't cancer. 醫生檢查了他皮膚上的痣，以確保不是癌症。
I heard "skin rash" in a podcast and wrote it in my notebook. 我在 Podcast 聽到「skin rash」，就把它記進筆記本。
After practice, I could use "skin rash" more confidently. 練習後，我更有自信地使用「skin rash」。

meaning: 四 紧身的， 贴身的
sentences: The nurse wrote down skin-tight with the note "四 紧身的， 贴身的". 護理師把 skin-tight 記下來，並註記「四 紧身的， 贴身的」。
The article mentioned skin-tight in a short paragraph. 文章在一段短文中提到了 skin-tight。
We practiced using skinflint in two different sentences. 我們練習把 skinflint 放進兩個不同句子裡。
The nurse wrote down skinflint with the note "四音效鬼". 護理師把 skinflint 記下來，並註記「四音效鬼」。

meaning: 皮膚（或類似的外層）全部或部分被去除。
sentences: My skinned knuckles hurt until the scrape healed. 我擦傷的指關節一直很痛，直到擦傷痊癒。
The report describes the result as skinned. 該報告將結果描述為“剝皮”。

meaning: 用於剝動物屍體皮的獵刀。
sentences: The term skinner refers to a hunting knife used for skinning animal carcasses. 剝皮刀一詞是指用來剝動物屍體皮的獵刀。
The lesson introduced skinner as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了史金納這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
He looks very skinny because he hasn't been eating properly. 他看起來非常瘦（皮包骨），因為他一直沒好好吃飯。
She was wearing a pair of tight skinny jeans and a white T-shirt. 她穿著一條緊身牛仔褲和一件白色 T 恤。
I decided to skip breakfast this morning because I was in a hurry. 我今天早上決定跳過早餐，因為我很趕時間。
The little girl was happily skipping down the garden path. 小女孩正開心地在花園小路上蹦蹦跳跳。

meaning: 教練、總監或其他領導者。
sentences: The term skipper refers to a coach, director, or other leader. 隊長一詞是指教練、主管或其他領導者。
The lesson introduced skipper as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「船長」這個易於理解的有用術語。
Three people were arrested after a skirmish in a bar. 三人在酒吧發生衝突後被捕。
The term skirmish refers to any minor dispute. 小衝突一詞是指任何小糾紛。
She wore a beautiful floral skirt to the summer party. 她穿了一件漂亮的碎花裙參加夏日派對。
The short skirt was fashionable back in the 1960s. 短裙在 1960 年代非常流行。

meaning: 嘲笑或諷刺；簡短的諷刺。
sentences: The term skit refers to a jeer or sally; a brief satire. 小品一詞指的是嘲笑或諷刺；簡短的諷刺。
The lesson introduced skit as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了小品作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The scientist examined the ancient skull to determine the person's age. 科學家檢查了那具古代頭骨以確定其年齡。
Be careful not to hit your skull on the low ceiling in the attic. 小心別在閣樓低矮的天花板上撞到腦袋。

meaning: 慘敗以致無法阻止任何對手的得分。
sentences: I skunked him at cards. 我在牌桌上對他進行了惡搞。
We fished all day but the lake skunked us. 我們釣魚了一整天，但湖水卻給我們帶來了臭味。
The sky is clear and blue today, with not a cloud in sight. 今天的空中晴朗蔚藍，看不見一朵雲。
The stars were shining brightly in the dark night sky. 星星在黑夜中閃爍。
The room was filled with natural light from the large skylight. 房間裡充滿了來自大型天窗的自然光。
They decided to install a skylight in the kitchen. 他們決定在廚房安裝一個天窗。
The city skyline is dominated by impressive skyscrapers made of glass and steel. 城市的天際線被由玻璃和鋼鐵構成的令人印象深刻的摩天大樓所佔據。
Living on the top floor of a skyscraper offers a breathtaking view of the whole city. 住在摩天大樓的頂層可以俯瞰整個城市的壯麗景色。

meaning: 建築物的澆築混凝土基礎。
sentences: Next week they'll pour the slab that the shed will sit on. 下週他們將澆築棚屋所在的板子。
The term slab refers to a poured-concrete foundation for a building. 術語“板”是指建築物的澆築混凝土基礎。
The rope was slack and needed to be tightened. 繩子鬆了，需要拉緊。
Business has been a bit slack lately. 最近生意有點蕭條。
Don't be such a slacker; you need to finish your work! 別當懶鬼；你需要完成你的工作！
He was seen as a bit of a slacker by his colleagues. 他在同事眼中被視為有點懶散的人。
The term slade refers to a valley, a flat grassy area, a glade. 斯萊德一詞指的是山谷、平坦的草地、空地。
The lesson introduced slade as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 slade 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The road was built using slag from the local ironworks. 這條路是利用當地鋼鐵廠的礦渣建造的。
The report highlights the problem of industrial slag in the area. 報告強調了該地區工業殘渣的問題。
The term slain refers to those who have been killed. 被殺一詞指的是那些被殺的人。
The lesson introduced slain as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「slain」這個易於理解的有用術語。
He drank a glass of cold water to slake his thirst. 他喝了一杯冰水來解渴。
She read several books to slake her curiosity about the subject. 她讀了幾本書來滿足她對該主題的好奇心。
He slammed the door shut and stomped angrily down the hallway. 他砰地一聲關上門，憤怒地穿過走廊。
The critics slammed the movie for its weak plot and poor acting. 評論家猛烈抨擊這部電影情節軟弱且演技拙劣。
He was accused of slander after making the false statements. 他在發表虛假言論後被控誹謗。
She sued the newspaper for slander after the article was published. 文章發表後，她控告報社誹謗。
The book provides examples of local slang expressions used in the city. 這本書提供了市內使用的地方俚語表達範例。
It is important to understand colloquial slang to communicate more effectively. 了解口語俚語對於更有效地溝通非常重要。

meaning: 坡度; 傾斜 、 、<a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/wiki/inclination" 傾斜</inclination" 傾斜</inclination。
sentences: The house was built on a bit of a slant and was never quite level. 這棟房子建在有點 傾斜 上，從來都不是很水平。 房子建得有點傾斜，從來都不是水平的。 這棟房子建在有點傾斜上，從來都不是很水平。

The term slant refers to A slope; an incline, inclination. 術語「傾斜」指的是 A 坡度; 傾斜 、<a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/wiki/adlin" 傾斜。 術語「傾斜」是指A坡度；傾斜，傾向。 術語「傾斜」是指 A 坡度; 注意 、<a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/wiki/adlin" 注意。
She gave him a sharp slap across the face after his rude comment. 在他發表粗魯言論後，她狠狠打（掌摑）了他一巴掌。
The news of the budget cuts was a slap in the face for the research team. 削減預算的消息對研究團隊來說是一種侮辱（拍在臉上的巴掌）。
The company decided to slash its prices to attract more customers. 公司決定大幅削減價格以吸引更多顧客。
He used a sharp knife to slash through the heavy ropes. 他用一把快刀砍斷了沈重的繩索。
A slashed zero cannot be confused with the letter O. 斜線零不能與字母 O 混淆。
The report describes the result as slashed. 報告將結果描述為大幅削減。
The criminal gang carried out razor slashings on their enemies. 犯罪集團用剃刀砍殺敵人。
The term slashing refers to The action of something that slashes. 術語「削減」指的是削減某物的動作。

meaning: 以（強）確定性期待（某事）；預見，預測。
sentences: The next version of our software is slated to be the best release ever. 我們軟體的下一個版本預計將是有史以來最好的版本。
To slate means to expect (something) with a (strong) degree of certainty; to anticipate, to predict. To slate 意指以（強）確定性期待（某事）；預見，預測。

meaning: 任何陸生等足類甲殼動物，包括波爾切利奧屬和近緣屬；土蝨。
sentences: The term slater refers to any terrestrial isopod crustacean of the genus Porcellio and allied genera; a woodlouse. 術語“slater”是指Porcellio屬和近緣屬的任何陸生等足類甲殼動物；一隻土蝨。
The lesson introduced slater as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了 slater 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The farmers take their livestock to the city to be slaughtered for meat. 農民們把家畜運到城裡屠宰以獲取肉類。
The history book provides a detailed account of the wartime slaughter. 這本歷史書詳細描述了戰爭時期的屠殺。
The history book discusses the tragic conditions of slaves in the past. 歷史書討論了過去奴隸們的悲慘境遇。
No one should be treated like a slave in a modern and free society. 在現代自由社會中，沒人應被像奴隸一樣對待。
The country finally abolished slavery in the mid-19th century. 該國最終在 19 世紀中葉廢除了奴隸制度。
Many young people are trapped in a life of modern-day slavery and exploitation. 許多青年陷入了現代奴隸制和剝削的生活（苦役）之中。
The legendary hero managed to slay the dragon and save the village. 傳奇英雄成功殺死了（斬殺）巨龍並救了村莊。
Many soldiers were slain during the long and violent conflict. 許多士兵在那場長期且激烈的衝突中被殺害。

meaning: 一個殺手；一個殺人犯；殺人的人。
sentences: The term slayer refers to a killer; a murderer; someone who slays. slayer這個字指的是殺手；一個殺人犯；殺人的人。
The lesson introduced slayer as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 slayer 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The slaying of the civil rights activist brought a storm of protest. 民權運動家被殺引發了抗議風暴。
The term slaying refers to Killing, especially the murder of a human. 殺戮一詞指的是殺戮，尤其是謀殺人類。

meaning: 以低品質為標誌；下;不足的。
sentences: Something described as sleazy is marked by low quality; inferior; inadequate. 被描述為低劣的東西意味著低品質；下;不足。
The word sleazy is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. sleazy 這個字常用來形容人、事或情況。

meaning: 由動物拉的低矮雪橇，通常在雪、冰或草地上。
sentences: The sledge ran far better upon the ice; I cannot say the same for the dogs. 雪橇在冰上跑得更好。我不能對狗說同樣的話。
The term sledge refers to A low sled drawn by animals, typically on snow, ice or grass. 雪橇一詞是指由動物拉的低雪橇，通常在雪、冰或草地上。

meaning: 具有均勻、光滑的表面；光滑。
sentences: Something described as sleek is having an even, smooth surface; smooth. 光滑的表面是指具有均勻、光滑的表面。光滑的。
The word sleek is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 光滑這個詞常用來形容人、事物或情況。
It's important to get enough sleep for your physical and mental health. 充足的睡眠對身心健康都很重要。
The baby is sleeping peacefully in the crib. 寶寶正在嬰兒床裡安靜地睡覺。

meaning: 經過一段時間後取得意想不到的成功的事情。
sentences: A box-office bomb when it first came out, the film was a sleeper, becoming much more popular decades after being released. 這部電影剛上映時就曾是票房炸彈，但後來卻處於沉睡狀態，在上映幾十年後變得更加受歡迎。
The term sleeper refers to something that achieves unexpected success after an interval of time. 「臥舖者」一詞指的是一段時間後取得意想不到的成功的事情。
I spent a sleepless night worrying about the exams. 我因考試而徹夜難眠。
The report describes the result as sleepless. 報告將結果描述為「失眠」。
I always feel a bit sleepy in the middle of the afternoon. 我通常在下午三四點時會感到有點小睏。
The warm milk made the little child feel very sleepy and relaxed. 熱牛奶讓那個小孩感到非常睏倦且放鬆。
The top button of his shirt sleeve was loose and needed fixing. 他襯衫袖口的扣子鬆了，需要修補。
She rolled up her sleeves and started working on the garden. 她捲起袖子，開始在花園裡忙活。
She has a slender and elegant figure like a professional dancer. 她身材纖細優雅，就像一位職業舞者。
The beautiful vase stood on a slender glass pedestal. 漂亮的噴花瓶放在一個細長的玻璃基座上。

meaning: 向側面移動某物（通常是鐵路線）。
sentences: The single line was slewed onto the disused up formation to make way for the future redoubling. 單線被轉向廢棄的隊形，為未來的加倍讓路。
To slew means to move something (usually a railway line) sideways. 迴轉意味著橫向移動某物（通常是鐵路線）。
Would you like another slice of delicious homemade apple pie? 妳想再要一片美味的手作蘋果派嗎？
She used a sharp knife to slice the fresh bread into pieces. 她用一把利刀將新鮮麵包切成片。

meaning: 因液體覆蓋而導致滑溜或光滑；常用於形容外貌。
sentences: This rain is making the roads slick. 這場雨使道路變得濕滑。
The top coating of lacquer gives this finish a slick look. 面漆使表面看起來光滑。
The children were happily playing on the large red slide in the park. 孩子們正開心地在公園的大紅溜滑梯上玩耍。
Please slide the window open to let some fresh air into the room. 請滑開窗戶，讓新鮮空氣進來。

meaning: 一個小 三明治 ，通常放在溫暖的 小圓麵包 。
sentences: We ordered five sliders. 我們訂了五個 滑塊 。 我們訂購了五個滑塊。 我們訂了五個。
The term slider refers to A small sandwich, typically served in a warm bun. 滑塊一詞指的是小 三明治 ，通常放在溫暖的 小圓麵包 中。 滑塊一詞指的是一種小三明治，通常放在熱麵包中。 準備指的是小三明治，通常放在溫暖的小圓麵包中。

meaning: Slide 的現在分詞與動名詞
sentences: Children were swinging and sliding in the playground. 孩子們在操場上盪鞦韆、滑行。
People often sliding when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會滑倒。
There has been a slight increase in the price of fuel over the past week. 過去一週燃料價格有輕微（微小）的上漲。
She felt a slight pain in her knee while she was running in the park. 她在公園跑步時感到膝蓋有一點輕微的疼痛。

meaning: 在很小的程度上或程度上。
sentences: He weighed slightly less than his wife who was a foot shorter. 他的體重比他矮一英尺的妻子略輕。
If someone acts slightly, they do so in a way that is to a small extent or degree. 如果某人的行為輕微，則他們以較小程度或程度的方式這樣做。
She has a slim and athletic figure because she exercises regularly. 她身材苗條且健美，因為她定期運動。
The new laptop is very slim and lightweight, making it easy to carry. 這台新筆電非常薄且輕巧，方便攜帶。

meaning: 任何粘液物质；或从某些动物（例如蜗牛或蛞蝓）的身体中渗出的粘液状物质。
sentences: The term slime refers to any mucilaginous substance; or a mucus-like substance which exudes from the bodies of certain animals, such as snails or slugs. 術語粘液是指任何粘液物質；或從某些動物（例如蝸牛或蛞蝓）的身體中滲出的粘液狀物質。
The lesson introduced slime as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了黏液作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 性質相似、覆蓋或塗抹或富含黏液。
sentences: The frog's body was all slimy. 青蛙的全身都是黏糊糊的。
Something described as slimy is resembling, of the nature of, covered or daubed with, or abounding in slime. 被描述為黏液的東西類似於黏液的性質，被黏液覆蓋或塗抹，或富含黏液。
Be careful not to slip on the wet and slippery bathroom floor. 小心別在濕滑的浴室地板上滑倒了。
I accidentally let the secret slip while talking to my friend. 我在和朋友聊天時不小心說溜了嘴，洩露了秘密。
I like to wear comfortable slippers when I'm relaxing at home. 我在家休息時喜歡穿舒服的拖鞋。
He bought a pair of soft and warm slippers for his grandfather. 他為祖父買了一雙柔軟溫暖的拖鞋。
Be careful not to fall on the wet and slippery bathroom floor. 小心別在濕滑的浴室地板上摔倒。
The mountain path was very slippery after the sudden rain. 突如其來的雨後，山路變得非常濕滑。

meaning: 某物滑倒的行為；一張紙條；打滑或突然鬆動。
sentences: The term slipping refers to The act of something that slips; a slip; a skidding or sudden loosening motion. 滑倒一詞指的是某物滑倒的行為；一張紙條；打滑或突然鬆動。
We learned the meaning of slipping during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了滑倒的含義。
He slit the bag open and the rice began pouring out. 他把袋子打開，米開始倒出來。
To slit means to cut a narrow opening. 切縫的意思是切出一個狹窄的開口。
She cut a thin sliver of cheese for her crackers. 她切了一小薄片起司配餅乾。
A sliver of light streamed through the gap in the curtains. 一束光線從窗簾縫隙中射入。
He is such a slob that he leaves dirty clothes all over the floor. 他很邋遢，總是把髒衣服丟得滿地都是。
Don't call your brother a slob just because his desk is messy. 不要只因為你哥哥的桌子很亂就叫他邋遢鬼。
The company's marketing slogan is very catchy and easy to remember. 這家公司的行銷標語（口號）非常響亮且容易記住。
The protesters were shouting slogans demanding better working conditions. 抗議者高喊口號，要求更好的工作條件。
The skiers were racing down the steep and snowy mountain slope. 滑雪者正從陡峭多雪的山坡上衝下來。
Our house is located on a gentle slope overlooking the entire bay. 我們的房子位於一個俯瞰整個海灣的緩坡上。
The manager criticized him for his sloppy work and lack of attention. 經理批評他工作馬虎（草率）且不專心。
The playground was very sloppy after the heavy rain last night. 大雨過後，操場變得非常泥濘。
Please insert the coin into the narrow slot to start the machine. 請將硬幣插入窄槽以啟動機器。
I have a ten-minute time slot available for a quick meeting tomorrow. 我明天有一個十分鐘的時段（位置）可以進行簡短會議。

meaning: 懶惰；思維遲緩；不願採取行動或勞動。
sentences: The term sloth refers to laziness; slowness in the mindset; disinclination to action or labour. 懶惰這個詞是指懶惰；思維遲緩；不願採取行動或勞動。
The lesson introduced sloth as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「懶惰」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 頭垂下來；下垂的姿勢；跛行的樣子
sentences: He sat with an unenthusiastic slouch. 他無精打采地坐著。
The term slouch refers to A hanging down of the head; a drooping posture; a limp appearance. 術語「slouch」指的是頭部垂下來；下垂的姿勢；跛行的樣子。

meaning: 蛇或其他爬行動物脫落的皮膚。
sentences: That is the slough of a rattler; we must be careful. 那就是響尾蛇的蛻皮；我們必須小心。
The term slough refers to the skin shed by a snake or other reptile. 腐肉一詞是指蛇或其他爬行動物脫落的皮膚。
The traffic was very slow this morning because of the heavy rain. 由於大雨，今天早上的交通非常緩慢。
He is a slow but steady worker who never makes mistakes. 他是一個動作慢但穩健、從不犯錯的員工。

meaning: 速度降低，或生產水準、經濟活動等下降。
sentences: The term slowdown refers to a reduction in speed, or a decrease in the level of production, economic activity, etc. 減速一詞是指速度的降低，或生產、經濟活動等水準的下降。
The lesson introduced slowdown as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了減速這個有用的術語，需要理解。

meaning: 從液體懸浮液中分離出固體。
sentences: The term sludge refers to solids separated from suspension in a liquid. 術語污泥是指從液體懸浮液中分離出的固體。
The lesson introduced sludge as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了污泥作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
to slug a gun 開槍
To slug means to load with a slug or slugs. To slug 的意思是裝載一個或多個彈頭。

meaning: 額外安打率較高的擊球手。
sentences: That will bring up the slugger, Jones. 這會帶來重擊手瓊斯。
The term slugger refers to A batter who has a high percentage of extra base hits. 重擊手一詞指的是額外安打率較高的擊球手。

meaning: 習慣性閒散、懶惰；懶惰;乏味的;不活躍的。
sentences: a sluggish man 一個遲鈍的人
Something described as sluggish is habitually idle and lazy; slothful; dull; inactive. 被形容為遲緩的東西通常是懶惰和懶惰的。懶惰;乏味的;不活躍。
Many people in the city live in crowded and unsanitary slums. 市內許多人住在擁擠且不衛生的貧民窟裡。
The project aims to improve the living conditions in the local slums. 該專案旨在改善當地貧民窟的生活條件。

meaning: 睡眠狀態非常淺，幾乎是清醒的。非常沉重的睡眠狀態。
sentences: The term slumber refers to a very light state of sleep, almost awake. A very heavy state of sleep. 睡眠一詞指的是一種非常淺的睡眠狀態，幾乎是清醒的。一種非常沉重的睡眠狀態。
The lesson introduced slumber as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「睡眠」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
Stock prices began to slump following the news of the financial crisis. 隨著金融危機的消息傳出，股價開始驟降（暴跌）。
The company's profits have slumped significantly over the past year. 公司的利潤在過去一年中顯著衰落。

meaning: 不名譽的標記；枯萎病或污點。
sentences: a slur on one's reputation 誹謗某人的名譽
The term slur refers to a mark of dishonour; a blight or stain. 誹謗一詞指的是不名譽的標記；枯萎病或污點。

meaning: 半融化的雪或冰，通常位於地面上。
sentences: As the skiing season drew to an end, there was nothing but slush left on the piste. 隨著滑雪季節接近尾聲，滑雪道上只剩下雪泥。
The term slush refers to Half-melted snow or ice, generally located on the ground. 雪泥一詞是指半融化的雪或冰，通常位於地面上。

meaning: 不忠誠的個人；不致力於某件事的人。
sentences: That guy was a job slut; he changed jobs way too often and quickly, to the point that employers will no longer hire him. 那傢伙是個工作蕩婦；他換工作太頻繁、太快，以至於雇主不再僱用他。
The term slut refers to a disloyal individual; someone who does not commit to a particular thing. 蕩婦一詞指的是不忠誠的人；不致力於某件事的人。
The makeup, high heels and short skirt made her look so slutty. 妝容、高跟鞋和短裙讓她看起來很放蕩。
Something described as slutty is of, resembling, or suitable for, a slut. 被描述為放蕩的東西是屬於、類似或適合蕩婦的。
He gave her a sly smile as he planned the surprise party. 他在計畫驚喜派對時對她露出了狡猾的（淘氣的）微笑。
The sly fox managed to escape from the hunters through the woods. 狡猾的狐狸成功地穿過森林逃離了獵人。
The mother gave her child a quick smack on the hand. 母親迅速拍了一下孩子的手。
He smacked his lips after tasting the delicious food. 他嚐了美味的食物後咂了咂嘴。

meaning: 一連串的巴掌聲；打某人的行為。
sentences: children who received regular smackings 經常挨打的孩子
The term smacking refers to A series of smacks; the act by which somebody is smacked. 術語「打耳光」是指一系列的打耳光；打某人的行為。
They live in a small but cozy house in the countryside. 他們住在鄉下一間雖小但溫馨的房子裡。
Every small effort counts toward achieving a big goal. 每一份微小的努力對於達成大目標都至關重要。
The worse things get, the smaller your focus should be. 事情越糟糕，你的焦點就應該越小。
The report describes the result as smaller. 該報告將結果描述為較小。

meaning: 由痘病毒科天花病毒引起的一種急性、高度傳染性的、常常致命的疾病。它在 20 世紀 70 年代被徹底消滅，但實驗室中仍然存在。倖存下來的人都留下了麻子。
sentences: The Europeans brought new diseases such as smallpox, measles, dysentery, influenza, syphilis and leprosy. 歐洲人帶來了天花、麻疹、痢疾、流感、梅毒和痲瘋病等新疾病。

The term smallpox refers to an acute, highly infectious often fatal disease caused by Variola virus of the family Poxviridae. It was completely eradicated in the 1970s, but still exists in laboratories. Those who survived were left with pockmarks. 天花一詞是指由痘病毒科的天花病毒引起的一種急性、高度傳染性且常常致命的疾病。它在 20 世紀 70 年代被徹底消滅，但實驗室中仍然存在。那些倖存下來的人都留下了麻子。
He is a very smart student who always gets the highest marks. 他是一個非常聰明的學生，總是拿到最高分。
Modern smartphones are much more than just communication devices. 現代智慧型手機不僅僅是通訊設備。
The ball smashed the glass vase into a thousand tiny pieces. 球把玻璃花瓶砸得粉碎（打碎）。
His debut album was a smash hit and topped the charts for weeks. 他的首張專輯獲得了重大成功（轟動一時），連續數週蟬聯榜首。
The boxer delivered a smashing blow to his opponent's head. 拳擊手對對手的頭部進行了猛烈的一擊。
The report describes the result as smashing. 報告稱這一結果是令人震驚的。

meaning: 透過摩擦將（一種物質，尤其是有顏色或髒的物質）散佈在表面上。
sentences: The artist smeared paint over the canvas in broad strokes. 藝術家用粗筆畫在畫布上塗抹顏料。
To smear means to spread (a substance, especially one that colours or is dirty) across a surface by rubbing. 塗抹意味著透過摩擦將（一種物質，尤其是著色或骯髒的物質）塗抹在表面上。
I love the smell of fresh coffee in the morning. 我喜歡早晨新鮮咖啡的味道。
Can you smell something burning? I think the toast is ready. 你聞到燒焦味了嗎？我想吐司好了。
foul- smelling (having a foul smell) 臭味（有臭味）
sweet- smelling (having a sweet smell) 甜甜香的（有甜甜的氣味）

meaning: 有表明存在設計問題的跡象；有代碼味道。
sentences: That smelly code needs to be refactored. 那些臭程式碼需要重構。
Something described as smelly is having signs that suggest a design problem; having a code smell. 被描述為“有臭味”的東西是指有跡象表明存在設計問題；有代碼味道。
He works as a smelter. 他是一名冶煉廠。
The term smelter refers to A person employed to do smelting. 冶煉廠一詞是指受僱進行冶煉的人員。
She had a warm and friendly smile that made me feel welcome. 她帶著溫暖友善的笑容，讓我感到賓至如歸。
He smiled at me and waved his hand. 他對我微笑並揮了揮手。
Smiling takes fewer muscles than frowning. 微笑比皺眉需要更少的肌肉。
The term smiling refers to The action of the verb to smile. 微笑一詞指的是動詞微笑的動作。
He had a smirk on his face after winning the game. 獲勝後，他臉上帶著得意的笑。
Don't smirk at me; it's not funny! 別對我傻笑；這一點也不好笑！

meaning: 與 愛 或 罷工 title="infatuation">迷戀 。
sentences: Bob was smitten with Laura from the first time he saw her The word smite is central here. 鲍勃从第一次见到劳拉时就 着迷了 。 「迷戀」這個詞是這裡的核心。 鮑伯從第一次見到勞拉起就被她迷住了。 「迷戀」這個詞是這裡的中心。 鮑伯從第一次見到勞拉時就著迷了。 「迷戀」這個詞是這裡的核心。

I was really smitten by the color combination, and soon repainted the entire house The word smite is central here. 我真的被這種顏色組合 迷住了 ，很快就重新粉刷了整個房子。 「smite」這個字是這裡的中心。 我真的被這個顏色組合迷住了，很快就重新粉刷了整個房子。 「smite」這個字是這裡的中心。 我真的被這種顏色組合迷住了，很快就重新粉刷了整個。 「smite house」這個字是這裡的中心。
The city is covered in a thick blanket of smog during the winter months. 冬天這座城市被一層厚厚的霧霾所覆蓋。
The government is trying to reduce air pollution and eliminate smog. 政府正試圖減少空氣污染並消除煙霧（霧霾）。
Smoking is strictly prohibited inside the entire building. 建築物內嚴禁吸菸。
Thick black smoke was rising from the burning house. 燃燒的房屋中冒出了滾滾黑煙。

meaning: 非法拳擊比賽；參見維基百科：皇家之戰（拳擊）。
sentences: The term smoker refers to an illicit boxing match; see Wikipedia:Battle Royal (boxing). 「吸菸者」一詞指的是非法拳擊比賽；請參閱維基百科：Battle Royal（拳擊）。
The lesson introduced smoker as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「吸煙者」這個易於理解的有用術語。
That woman is smoking! 那個女人竟然抽煙了！
The report describes the result as smoking. 報告將結果描述為吸煙。

meaning: 有煙味或氣味；帶有煙味的。
sentences: a smoky whisky 煙燻威士忌
Something described as smoky is having a flavour or odour like smoke; flavoured with smoke. 煙燻味是指有如菸的味道或氣味；帶有煙燻味。
The surface of the lake was perfectly smooth and calm at dawn. 日出時分，湖面非常平滑且平靜。
The transition to the new system went very smooth without issues. 向新系統的過渡進展得非常順利，沒有問題。

meaning: 一個人，或者那個人，平滑。
sentences: The term smoother refers to one who, or that which, smooths. 平滑者一詞指的是平滑的人或平滑的人。
The lesson introduced smoother as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了 smoother 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
talk smoothly 說話順利
The plans didn't go/run as smoothly as we'd hoped. 這些計劃並沒有像我們希望的那樣順利進行。

meaning: 給定域上的最高階導數（可微性類別）。
sentences: Smoothness can vary from 0 (for a nondifferentiable function) to infinity (for a smooth function). 平滑度可以從 0（對於不可微函數）到無窮大（對於平滑函數）變化。
The term smoothness refers to The highest order of derivative (the differentiability class) over a given domain. 術語「平滑度」是指給定域上導數的最高階（可微分類）。

meaning: 窒息；窒息;或多或少完全阻礙某物或某人的呼吸。
sentences: He smothered her by pressing his hand over her mouth. 他用手摀住她的嘴，讓她窒息。
People often smother when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會感到窒息。

meaning: 污點 或 塗抹 ，特別是 ）>Wiki* //~ href="/wiki/sooty" title="sooty">烏黑 一個。
sentences: There was a smudge on the paper. 紙上有 污跡 。 紙上有一處污跡。 紙上有污跡。
The term smudge refers to A blemish or smear, especially a dark or sooty one. 污跡一詞是指 污點 或 塗抹 ，特別是 烏黑 一個。 污跡一詞是指污點或污跡，尤其是深色或煤煙狀的污跡。 污跡是指污點或塗抹，特別是烏黑一個。

meaning: 表現出沾沾自喜的樣子；表現出自滿、自我滿足。
sentences: a smug look on her face 她臉上洋溢著得意的表情
Something described as smug is showing smugness; showing self-complacency, self-satisfaction. 所謂自鳴得意的東西，就是表現出自鳴得意的樣子；表現出自滿、自我滿足。
The police arrested the suspect for trying to smuggle illegal drugs. 警方逮捕了企圖走私非法毒品的嫌疑人。
They tried to smuggle the rare artifacts out of the country in a truck. 他們試圖用卡車將稀有文物偷運出境。
I usually have a healthy snack like an apple in the afternoon. 我通常在下午吃蘋果之類的健康點心。
The children were happily munching on their favorite snacks. 孩子們正開心地啃著他們最喜歡的點心。
we hit a snag 我們遇到了困難
The term snag refers to a problem or difficulty with something. 「障礙」一詞指的是某事的問題或困難。
A small snail was slowly crawling across the garden path. 一隻小蝸牛正緩慢地在花園小路上爬行。
The traffic was moving at a snail's pace because of the accident. 由於事故，交通正以蝸牛般緩慢的速度移動。
Many people are naturally afraid of snakes and other reptiles. 許多人天生害怕蛇和其他爬行類動物。
The path snakes through the dense forest and up the mountain. 這條路蜿蜒穿過茂密的森林，直達山上。
The dry branch managing to snap under the weight of the snow. 枯枝在積雪的重量下竟然折斷了。
He managed to snap a beautiful photo of the rare exotic bird. 他設法拍到了一張那種稀有外來鳥類的漂亮照片。

meaning: 一個人，或那個人， 快照 。
sentences: a snapper -up of bargains 討價還價的 快照 討價還價的快照
the snapper of a whip 鞭子的 鯛魚 鞭子的鯛魚

meaning: 整齊的;穿著得體；鋒利的。
sentences: Here he is, looking snappy in his brand-new suit. 他就在這裡，穿著嶄新的西裝，看起來精神抖擻。
The report describes the result as snappy. 報告稱這一結果很快。

meaning: 瞥見某事；某一時刻某事物的描繪。
sentences: The article offered a snapshot of life in that region. 這篇文章提供了該地區生活的快照。
The term snapshot refers to a glimpse of something; a portrayal of something at a moment in time. 快照一詞指的是對某事物的一瞥；對某一時刻某事物的描繪。
The hunter set a snare to catch the animal. 獵人設下陷阱來捕捉動物。
She was snared by his lies and empty promises. 她被他的謊言與空頭支票所誘捕（受騙）。
The dog began to snarl at the stranger. 這隻狗開始對陌生人咆哮。
The traffic snarl caused a long delay on the highway. 交通混亂（糾結）導致公路嚴重延誤。
The thief tried to snatch her bag while she was waiting for the bus. 小偷在她等公車時試圖奪走她的包。
The team managed to snatch victory in the final minutes of the match. 該隊在比賽最後幾分鐘奪得了勝利。
Lucinda impressed her class when she revealed how snatched she was under her baggy sweatshirt. 當露辛達透露自己在寬鬆的運動衫下是多麼被搶奪時，給全班同學留下了深刻的印象。
The report describes the result as snatched. 報告將結果描述為「搶奪」。
We decided to sneak into the movie theater through the back door. 我們決定偷偷溜進（潛行）電影院後門。
The little boy tried to sneak a cookie from the kitchen before dinner. 小男孩試圖從廚房偷拿（偷偷地做）一塊餅乾。
She bought a pair of comfortable new sneakers for her morning runs. 她為晨跑買了一雙舒適的新運動鞋（球鞋）。
The students wore shorts and sneakers for their physical education class. 學生們穿著短褲和運動鞋上體育課。
I found his sneaky behavior to be rather suspicious and annoying. 我發現他鬼鬼祟祟的行為相當可疑且令人討厭。
It was a sneaky trick to try and win the match unfairly. 試圖透過不公平的卑鄙手段贏得比賽。
We asked the sneer for advice before making a decision. 我們在做決定前先向這位sneer請教。
During the meeting, the sneer answered every question patiently. 會議中，這位sneer耐心回答了每個問題。
The dust in the empty room made him sneeze several times. 房間裡的灰塵讓他打了好幾個噴嚏。
Please cover your mouth when you sneeze to prevent spreading germs. 打噴嚏時請捂住嘴，以防傳播細菌。
The dog began to sniff around the tree, looking for the ball. 狗開始在樹周圍聞來聞去，尋找球。
She sniffed with disapproval when she heard his ridiculous proposal. 當她聽到他那荒謬的提案時，不屑地哼了一聲（蔑視）。

meaning: 用短而鋒利的動作剪斷，如用剪刀。
sentences: I don't want you to take much hair off; just snip my mullet off. 我不想讓你脫掉太多頭髮；把我的鯔魚剪掉吧。
People often snip when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會批評。
The term snipe refers to A cigarette butt. 鷸一詞指的是煙蒂。
We learned the meaning of snipe during today's lesson. 今天的課我們學習了snipe的意思。

meaning: 使用遠程小型武器從隱蔽位置進行精確攻擊的人。
sentences: The sniper shot him in the head. 狙擊手朝他的頭部開了一槍。
The term sniper refers to a person using long-range small arms for precise attacks from a concealed position. 狙擊手一詞是指使用遠程小型武器從隱蔽位置進行精確攻擊的人。

meaning: 某物的一小部分，例如歌曲或織物；樣本。
sentences: From the snippet I heard of their rehearsal, they sound pretty good. 從我聽到他們排練的片段來看，他們聽起來相當不錯。
The term snippet refers to a small part of something, such as a song or fabric; sample. 「片段」一詞指的是某事物的一小部分，例如歌曲或織物；樣本。
Don't snoop around in my private room! 別在我的私人房間裡到處窺探！
She caught him snooping through her emails. 她抓到他正在偷看她的電子郵件。

meaning: 睡覺，尤其是短暫的睡覺；打瞌睡，打瞌睡。
sentences: The boss caught him snoozing at his desk. 老闆發現他在辦公桌前打瞌睡。
People often snooze when the situation calls for it. 人們常在情況需要時打瞌睡。
He began to snore loudly as soon as he fell asleep on the sofa. 他一在沙發上睡著就開始大聲打呼。
The loud snoring from the next room kept me awake all night. 隔壁房間響亮的打鼾聲讓我整晚沒睡著。

meaning: 打噴嚏；透過鼻子粗略地呼氣。
sentences: She snorted with laughter. 她嗤笑一聲。
People often snort when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常嗤之以鼻。

meaning: 野獸（如豬）的長而突出的鼻子、嘴巴和下巴。
sentences: The pig rooted around in the dirt with its snout. 豬用鼻子在泥土裡生根。
The term snout refers to the long, projecting nose, mouth, and jaw of a beast, as of pigs. 鼻子一詞指的是野獸（如豬）的長而突出的鼻子、嘴巴和下巴。
The ground was covered with a thick layer of white snow. 地面覆蓋著一層厚厚的白雪。
It hasn't snowed in this area for more than ten years. 這個地區已經十多年沒下過雪了。

meaning: 一種小蛋糕，通常是奶油餡的，上面覆蓋著巧克力糖霜和椰絲。
sentences: It didn't take long to eat a packetful of snowballs - they are simply delicious. 沒多久就吃完了一包雪球——簡直太好吃了。
The term snowball refers to a small cake, typically cream-filled and covered in chocolate icing and desiccated coconut. 雪球一詞指的是一種小蛋糕，通常是奶油餡的，上面覆蓋著巧克力糖霜和椰絲。
There has been snowfall every day this week. 这周每天都下雪。
The term snowfall refers to an instance of falling of snow. 術語“降雪”是指下雪的情況。

meaning: 雪晶體，具有近似六角對稱性。
sentences: The term snowflake refers to a crystal of snow, having approximate hexagonal symmetry. 術語「雪花」是指具有近似六角形對稱性的雪晶體。
The lesson introduced snowflake as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了雪花作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The mountain peak looked beautiful with its white snowy cap. 山頂覆蓋著白雪，看起來非常漂亮。
We stayed at home and drank hot chocolate on a cold snowy day. 在寒冷的下雪天，我們待在家裡喝熱巧克力。
I hope the people we couldn't invite don't see it as a snub. 我希望我們無法邀請的人不要認為這是一種冷落。
The term snub refers to A deliberate affront or slight. 「冷落」一詞指的是故意冒犯或輕視。

meaning: 用鼻子快速吸氣的動作；吸一口氣，吸一口氣。
sentences: The term snuff refers to the act of briskly inhaling by the nose; a sniff, a snort. 「鼻煙」一詞指的是用鼻子快速吸氣的行為。一聲嗅，一聲鼻息。
The lesson introduced snuff as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了鼻煙這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 溫暖 和 溫暖 和 溫暖rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/wiki/cosy" title="cosy">舒適 。
sentences: I felt snug tucked up in my snug bed. 我感覺 舒服 躺在我的 舒服 床上。 我躺在舒適的床上，感覺很舒服。 我躺在我舒適的床上，感覺很舒服。
The report describes the result as snug. 報告稱這一結果是令人滿意的。 報告稱這一結果是令人滿意的。 報告稱這個結果是令人滿意的。

meaning: 靠近另一個人或物體躺下，擁抱或感到舒適。
sentences: My girlfriend and I love to snuggle. 我和女朋友喜歡依偎在一起。
The last drop of jager snuggled the corner of the pint. 最後一滴雅格啤酒緊貼在品脫啤酒的一角。
I was very tired, so I decided to go to bed early. 我很累，所以我決定早點睡覺。
She speaks English so well that people think she's a native speaker. 她英語說得非常好，人們以為她是母語人士。
The heavy rain began to soak through his clothes after just a few minutes. 幾分鐘後，大雨就開始滲透（浸透）他的衣服。
You should soak the beans in water overnight before cooking them. 烹飪豆子前應將其在水中浸泡一夜。
Please wash your hands thoroughly with warm water and soap. 請用溫水和肥皂徹底洗手。
She bought a bar of organic soap with a relaxing lavender scent. 她買了一塊帶有放鬆薰衣草香味的有機肥皂。
The eagle began to soar high above the mountains in the clear sky. 老鷹在清朗的天空中向著高山翱翔。
Stock prices began to soar following the news of the company's success. 隨著公司成功的消息傳出，股價開始激增。
The little girl began to sob quietly after she lost her favorite toy. 小女孩在弄丟心愛的玩具後開始輕聲啜泣。
She couldn't help but sob with joy when she heard the good news. 聽到好消息時，她禁不住喜極而泣（啜泣）。
He decided to stay sober during the entire party to be the safe driver. 為了當安全駕駛，他決定在整個派對期間保持清醒。
The news of the accident had a sober effect on everyone at the office. 事故的消息讓辦公室的每個人都變得嚴肅（沈重）起來。

meaning: 引起更清醒的思考或擔憂。
sentences: It was a sobering thought that I had almost killed myself. That was something I wouldn't soon do on purpose again. 我差點自殺了，這讓我警醒。我不會很快再故意這麼做。
The report describes the result as sobering. 報告稱這項結果發人深省。

meaning: 不慌不忙的狀態或品質；平靜的狀態。
sentences: The term sobriety refers to the state or quality of being unhurried; a state of calm. 清醒一詞是指不慌不忙的狀態或品質。平靜的狀態。
The lesson introduced sobriety as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「清醒」這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。
Soccer is a very popular sport that attracts millions of fans. 足球是一項受歡迎的運動，吸引了數百萬名粉絲。
The kids are playing soccer in the park every Saturday morning. 孩子們每週六早上都在公園踢足球。
She is a very sociable person who enjoys meeting new people. 她是一個非常熱衷社交（好交際）的人，喜歡結識新朋友。
He became more sociable after joining the local community center. 加入當地社區中心後，他變得更加友善（好交際）。
She leads a very active social life and has many close friends. 她過著非常積極的社交生活，有很多親密的朋友。
Social media has changed the way we communicate with each other. 社交媒體改變了我們彼此溝通的方式。
The political scientist wrote a book about the history of socialism. 這位政治科學家寫了一本關於社會主義歷史的書。
Socialism is an ideology based on the principle of collective ownership. 社會主義是一種基於集體所有制原則的意識形態。
He has been an active member of the local socialist party for years. 他多年來一直是當地社會主義政黨的活躍成員。
The country was ruled by a socialist government for several decades. 該國由一個社會主義政府統治了幾十年。

meaning: 與他人互動、社交的行為。
sentences: Forced socialization rarely creates strong friendships, but there are exceptions. 強迫社交很少能建立牢固的友誼，但也有例外。
The term socialization refers to The act of interacting with others, of being social. 社交化一詞是指與他人互動、社交的行為。
The students enjoyed socializing at the party after finishing exams. 考試結束後，學生們在派對上愉快地社交（往來）。
It is important for young children to learn how to socialize with others. 幼兒學習如何與他人社交是非常重要的。
socially awkward 社交上尷尬
If someone acts socially, they do so in a way that is in social contexts. 如果某人進行社交行為，他們會在社交背景下以某種方式這樣做。

meaning: 屬於或關於社會或社會團體，或他們的活動、習俗等。
sentences: Something described as societal is of or pertaining to society or social groups, or to their activities, customs, etc. 被描述為社會的東西是屬於或屬於社會或社會群體，或他們的活動、習俗等。
The word societal is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 社會這個詞常用來描述人、事物或情況。
Education plays a vital role in the development of a modern society. 教育在現代社會的發展中扮演著至關重要的角色。
We must work together to solve the various problems in our society. 我們必須共同努力解決社會中的各種問題。

meaning: 社會學的或關於社會學的。
sentences: Something described as sociological is of or pertaining to sociology. 被描述為社會學的東西屬於社會學或與社會學有關。
The word sociological is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 社會學這個詞常用來描述人、事物或情況。

meaning: 研究社會學領域的科學家；社會科學家。
sentences: The term sociologist refers to a scientist studying the field of sociology; a social scientist. 社會學家一詞是指研究社會學領域的科學家；社會科學家。
The lesson introduced sociologist as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了社會學家作為一個有用的術語來理解。
She decided to major in sociology because she is interested in human behavior. 她決定主修社會學，因為她對人類行為感興趣。
Modern sociology explores the complex structures and dynamics of society. 現代社會學探索社會的複雜結構和動態。
She bought a new pair of warm wool socks for the winter. 她買了一雙新的暖和羊毛襪過冬。
He gave the punching bag a strong sock. 他用力擊打（猛擊）了沙袋。
I need to buy some new warm wool socks for the winter trip. 我需要為冬季旅行買一些新的保暖羊毛襪。
The little boy was wearing a pair of colorful matching socks. 小男孩穿著一雙繽紛的成套襪子。
Please make sure you pull the plug out of the socket before cleaning the machine. 清潔機器前，請確保將插頭從插座中拔出。
The light bulb was not screwed properly into the socket, so it wouldn't turn on. 燈泡沒有正確旋入燈座（插座），所以打不開。
Would you like a glass of cold soda with your meal? 你想用餐時喝杯冷汽水嗎？
Drinking too much soda can be bad for your health and teeth. 喝太多汽水對你的健康和牙齒都不好。
We spent the whole evening lying on the sofa and watching movies. 我們整個晚上都躺在沙發上看電影。
The new sofa is very soft and comfortable. 這張新沙發非常柔軟舒適。
The new couch is very soft and comfortable to lie on. 這張新沙發非常柔軟，躺起來很舒服。
She spoke in a soft and gentle voice that made me feel at ease. 她用溫柔和緩的聲音說話，讓我感到安心。
a softball interview 壘球採訪
The term softball refers to a question designed to be easy to answer. 壘球一詞是指設計為易於回答的問題。
The butter will soften if you leave it at room temperature for an hour. 如果在室溫下放一小時，奶油會變軟。
The manager's voice began to soften as he realized she was telling the truth. 當經理意識到她在說實話時，語氣開始變得溫和。
The masseuse was rubbing my back too softly for my liking, so I asked her to go harder. 按摩師按摩我的背部的力道太輕了，我不喜歡，所以我讓她用力一點。
If someone acts softly, they do so in a way that is in a soft manner; gently. 如果某人的行為很溫和，那麼他們會以溫和的方式行事；輕輕地。
The new software allows users to edit photos and videos more easily. 這款新軟體允許使用者更輕鬆地編輯照片和影片。
We need to update the system software to ensure better security and performance. 我們需要更新系統軟體，以確保更好的安全性和性能。
a soggy film 濕漉漉的電影
Something described as soggy is uninteresting, dull. 被描述為濕漉漉的東西是無趣的、沉悶的。

meaning: 嗬；你好；從遠方打電話時使用的一個詞。
sentences: The word soho is used in English writing and speech. soho 這個字用於英語寫作和演講。
The lesson explained how to use soho in context. 本課程解釋瞭如何在上下文中使用 soho。
The soil in this area is very rich and fertile for farming crops. 這個地區的土壤非常肥沃，適合耕種作物。
The children were playing happily with the soil in the garden. 孩子們正在花園裡開心地玩泥土。

meaning: 孤獨或痛苦時的安慰或安慰。
sentences: You cannot put a monetary value on emotional solace. 你不能用金錢來衡量情感上的安慰。
The term solace refers to comfort or consolation in a time of loneliness or distress. 「安慰」一詞是指在孤獨或痛苦時的安慰或安慰。
Solar energy is a clean and renewable source of power for our homes. 太陽能是我們家庭的一種清潔且可再生的能源來源。
The solar system consists of the Sun and all the planets that orbit around it. 太陽系由太陽及其周圍運行的所有行星組成。

meaning: 任何各種易熔化的合金，通常是錫和鉛，用於修補、塗覆或連接金屬物體（通常很小）。
sentences: The term solder refers to any of various easily-melted alloys, commonly of tin and lead, that are used to mend, coat, or join metal objects, usually small. 焊料一詞指的是各種易熔化的合金，通常是錫和鉛，用於修補、塗覆或連接通常較小的金屬物體。
The lesson introduced solder as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了焊料作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The brave soldiers fought for their country's freedom and peace. 勇敢的士兵為國家的自由與和平而戰。
My grandfather was a soldier in the army during the war. 我祖父在戰爭期間是一名軍人。
She is the sole survivor of the tragic plane crash last year. 她是那次慘烈空難中唯一的倖存者。
The sharp stone caused a small cut on the sole of his foot. 鋒利的石頭在他腳掌上劃了一個小口子。
The new chef was solely responsible for attending the grill. 新廚師全權負責參加燒烤活動。
If someone acts solely, they do so in a way that is alone; exclusively. 如果某人單獨行動，那麼他就是以單獨的方式行事；只。
The graduation ceremony was a very solemn and moving occasion. 畢業典禮是一個非常莊嚴且動人的場合。
He made a solemn promise never to reveal the secret to anyone. 他鄭重（嚴肅）地承諾絕不向任何人透露這個秘密。
The organization is soliciting donations for the refugees. 該組織正在為難民招募（請求）捐款。
Don't solicit for business in this residential area. 別在住宅區招攬生意。

meaning: 招攬行為或實例；請願;提議。
sentences: The term solicitation refers to the action or instance of soliciting; petition; proposal. 「招攬」一詞指招攬的行為或實例；請願;提議。
The lesson introduced solicitation as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「招攬」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 在美國部分地區，城市、城鎮或其他司法管轄區的首席法律官。
sentences: The term solicitor refers to in parts of the U.S., the chief legal officer of a city, town or other jurisdiction. 在美國部分地區，「律師」一詞指的是城市、城鎮或其他司法管轄區的首席法律官。
The lesson introduced solicitor as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「律師」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
He is very solicitous about his elderly mother's health. 他非常掛念他年邁母親的健康。
The doctor provided a solicitous care for the patient. 醫生為病人提供了熱切周到的照護。
I appreciate your solicitude for my well-being. 我感謝你對我福祉的掛念。
She expressed her solicitude about the future of the project. 她表達了對專案未來的憂慮。
The table is made of high-quality solid oak wood from local sources. 餐桌是由當地高品質的實心橡木製成的。
Water turns into solid ice when the temperature drops below zero. 當氣溫降到零度以下時，水會變成固態的冰。
The workers showed great solidarity during the national strike yesterday. 工人們在全國大罷工中展現了極大的團結。
The international community expressed solidarity with the victims of the crisis. 國際社會表達了對危機受害者的團結與支持。
If someone acts solidly, they do so in a way that is in a solid or firm manner. 如果一個人行事紮實，他就會以紮實或堅定的方式行事。
The speaker responded solidly during the discussion. 演講者在討論中做出了積極的回應。
He led a solitary life in a small wooden cottage in the mountains. 他獨自（孤獨地）生活在山間的一座小木屋裡。
The eagle is a solitary bird that hunts alone in the wilderness. 老鷹是一種獨自（單獨）在荒野中狩獵的鳥類。
She enjoyed the solitude of the quiet mountain village during her trip. 她在旅行期間享受著寧靜山村的孤獨（寂靜）。
Many writers seek solitude to focus on their work and creativity. 許多作家尋求獨處（隱居）以便專注於寫作和創意。
The young musician performed a brilliant violin solo at the concert. 這位年輕音樂家在音樂會上進行了精彩的小提琴獨奏。
He decided to go on a solo road trip across the country last summer. 他去年夏天決定獨自進行一場跨國公路旅行。
That mystery should be easily soluble. 這個謎團應該很容易解開。
Something described as soluble is able to be solved or explained. 被描述為可溶的事物能夠被解決或解釋。
We are working together to find an effective solution to the problem. 我們正共同努力為這個問題尋找一個有效的解決方案。
The scientific solution was based on years of dedicated research. 該科學解決方案是基於多年專注研究的成果。
He is a very smart student who can solve difficult math problems. 他是一個非常聰明的學生，能解決困難的數學題。
We need to find a way to solve this technical issue as soon as possible. 我們需要儘快找到解決這個技術問題的方法。

meaning: 具有溶解能力；造成解決方案。
sentences: Something described as solvent is having the power of dissolving; causing solution. 所謂溶劑，就是具有溶解能力的東西；導致解決方案。
The word solvent is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 溶劑這個字常用來描述人、事物或情況。
The first successful solver of the puzzle will win a prize. 第一個成功解決難題的人將贏得獎品。
The term solver refers to One who or that which solves. 解決者一詞指的是解決問題的人或事物。

meaning: 動物的整個軸向部分，包括頭、頸、軀幹和尾部。
sentences: The term soma refers to the whole axial portion of an animal, including the head, neck, trunk, and tail. 軀體一詞是指動物的整個軸向部分，包括頭部、頸部、軀幹和尾巴。
The lesson introduced soma as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「體摩」這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 屬於或與體壁有關的； somatopleuric; 頂樓 。
sentences: the somatic stalk of the yolk sac of an embryo 胚胎卵黃囊的 體細胞 柄 胚胎卵黃囊的體細胞柄
The report describes the result as somatic. 該報告將這一結果描述為軀體的。 該報告將這一結果描述為軀體的。 報告將這一結果描述為軀體的。
Something described as somber is uS standard spelling of sombre. 被描述為陰沉的東西是陰沉的美國標準拼寫。
The word somber is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 陰沉這個詞常用來形容人、事或情況。

meaning: 黑暗的;陰沉;陰暗的，燈光昏暗的。
sentences: The report describes the result as sombre. 報告稱結果令人沮喪。
Everyone noticed the sombre tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的陰沉語氣。
Would you like some more tea or coffee? 你想再要點茶或咖啡嗎？
Some people prefer to live in the city, while others like the countryside. 有些人喜歡住在城市，而有些人則喜歡鄉下。
Somebody is waiting for you at the reception. 有人在接待處等你。
He felt like somebody after winning the award. 獲獎後他覺得自己成了個大人物。
Someday I hope to travel around the world and see different cultures. 有一天我希望能環遊世界，看看不同的文化。
I'm sure that we will find a solution to this problem someday. 我確定我們有一天會找到解決這個問題的方法。
We managed to finish the project on time somehow, despite the delay. 儘管延誤了，我們還是不知何故設法準時完成了專案。
I'll find a way to help you somehow; don't worry too much. 我會不知何故（設法）找到幫妳的方法；別太擔心。
Someone left their umbrella on the bus. 有人把傘忘在了公車上。
I need to talk to someone about the problem. 我需要找人談談這個問題。
There is someone at the front door; could you please see who it is? 門口有人，你能去看看是誰嗎？
I need someone to help me with this heavy suitcase. 我需要有人幫我搬這個沉重的行李箱。
We can't find the damned thing, but it must be someplace. 我們找不到那該死的東西，但它一定在某個地方。
The team responded someplace to the change. 團隊在某個地方對這一變化做出了反應。
The term somerset refers to archaic form of somersault. 薩默塞特一詞指的是古式的空翻。
The lesson introduced somerset as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了薩默塞特作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
I have something important to tell you after the meeting. 會議結束後我有件重要的事要告訴妳。
Something strange happened in the office yesterday afternoon. 辦公室昨天下午發生了一些奇怪的事。
Let's meet for a coffee and a chat sometime next week. 我們下週某個時候見面喝杯咖啡聊聊天吧。
I would love to visit the historical museum sometime soon. 我很想在近期某個時候參觀那座歷史博物館。
Sometimes I like to go for a long walk alone to clear my mind. 有時我喜歡獨自長距離散步以清醒頭腦。
She sometimes forgets her umbrella and gets wet in the rain. 她有時會忘記帶傘，結果被雨淋濕。
The test results were somewhat better than we had expected. 測試結果比我們預想的要好一些。
I was somewhat surprised to hear the sudden news of his resignation. 聽到他突然辭職的消息，我感到有些驚訝。
I left my car keys somewhere, but I can't remember where. 我把車鑰匙丟在某個地方了，但記不起來在哪裡。
Let's go somewhere quiet where we can talk in peace. 我們去個安靜的地方，可以安靜地談談。
My son is currently studying engineering at university. 我的兒子目前正在大學攻讀工程學。
They have two daughters and one young son. 他們有兩個女兒和一個小兒子。

meaning: 提供這種迴聲定位的設備。
sentences: They finally bought a new sonar to replace the 40-year-old unit that sometimes didn't work right. 他們最終購買了一台新的聲納來替換已有 40 年歷史、有時無法正常工作的聲納。
The term sonar refers to a device that provides such echolocation. 術語聲納是指提供這種迴聲定位的設備。
She sang a beautiful traditional song at the talent show. 她在才藝表演中唱了一首優美的傳統歌曲。
What is the name of that catchy song on the radio? 收音機裡那首好聽的歌叫什麼名字？

meaning: 屬於聲音的或與聲音有關的。
sentences: a sonic extravagance 聲音的奢侈
on a sonic level 在聲音層面上

meaning: 對男孩或男人的稱呼，表達蔑視、警告等。
sentences: The term sonny refers to form of address to a boy or man, to express contempt, warning etc. sonny 一詞是指對男孩或男人的稱呼，表達蔑視、警告等。
The lesson introduced sonny as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 sonny 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
I hope you get well soon and come back to work. 我希望你早日康復並回到工作崗位。
The train should arrive soon; it's already 10:00 a.m. 火車應該快到了，現在已經上午十點了。
I would sooner die than marry you! 我 寧願死 也不願嫁給你 ！ 我寧願死也不願意嫁給你！ 我寧願死也不願意嫁給你！
Sooner than have a problem later, I made sure the policy was in order. 早於 出現問題，我就確保政策是正確的。 早在出現問題之前，我就確保政策是正確的。 早在出現問題時，我就確保政策是正確的。

meaning: 由煤、石油等不完全燃燒產生的無定形碳和焦油的細黑色或深棕色顆粒。
sentences: The term soot refers to fine black or dull brown particles of amorphous carbon and tar, produced by the incomplete combustion of coal, oil etc. 煙灰一詞是指由煤、石油等不完全燃燒產生的細小的黑色或暗棕色無定形碳和焦油顆粒。
The lesson introduced soot as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了煙灰作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The mother sang a beautiful lullaby to soothe the crying baby. 母親唱了一首優美的搖籃曲來安撫（安慰）哭泣的寶寶。
The cool drink of water helped to soothe her dry and sore throat. 涼爽的水有助於緩解（減輕）她乾燥疼痛的喉嚨。
Modern medical equipment is becoming increasingly sophisticated and accurate. 現代醫療設備正變得越來越精密且準確。
She is a sophisticated woman who has traveled all over the world. 她是一位見多識廣（老練）的女性，足跡遍佈世界各地。
We need more sophistication to solve this issue effectively. 我們需要更多sophistication才能有效解決這個問題。
The nurse's sophistication made the plan easier to follow. 護理師的sophistication讓計畫更容易執行。
As a sophomore at university, she is starting to focus on her major. 作為一名大二學生，她開始專注於自己的專業。
The college provides various resources to help sophomores with their studies. 學院提供多種資源來幫助大二（或高二）學生學習。

meaning: 執行女高音部分的人或樂器。
sentences: soprano saxophone 高音薩克斯風
The term soprano refers to a person or instrument that performs the soprano part. 女高音一詞是指演奏女高音部分的人或樂器。

meaning: 魔術師或巫師。有時特別是男性。
sentences: The term sorcerer refers to a magician or wizard. Sometimes specifically male. 術士一詞指的是魔術師或巫師。有時特別是男性。
The lesson introduced sorcerer as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了巫師這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 神奇的力量；使用巫術或魔法。
sentences: The tale is full of magic and sorcery. 這個故事充滿了魔法和巫術。
In the Middle Ages, people were often accused of practicing sorcery. 在中世紀，人們常被指控施行巫術。

meaning: 令人厭惡的、不光彩的、卑鄙的或可鄙的。
sentences: The report describes the result as sordid. 報告稱結果是骯髒的。
Everyone noticed the sordid tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這訊息的骯髒語氣。
I have a sore throat and a slight fever today. 我今天喉嚨痛且有點發燒。
His muscles were sore after the intense workout yesterday. 激烈運動後，他的肌肉今天很酸痛。

meaning: 疼痛的性質、狀態或狀況；痛苦。
sentences: The salve made the soreness go away, but with the aches gone I suddenly noticed my other pains. 藥膏讓酸痛消失了，但隨著疼痛消失，我突然注意到我的其他疼痛。
The term soreness refers to The property, state, or condition of being sore; painfulness. 術語「酸痛」是指酸痛的性質、狀態或狀況；痛苦。

meaning: 學院或大學女學生的社會組織；通常由希臘字母標識。
sentences: Every day is a party at this sorority! 這個聯誼會每天都是聚會！
The term sorority refers to a social organization of female students at a college or university; usually identified by Greek letters. 聯誼會一詞是指學院或大學女學生的社會組織；通常用希臘字母來標示。
Everyone expressed their deep sorrow at the news of the accident. 每個人都對事故的消息表達了深深的悲哀。
Her eyes were full of sorrow after hearing the tragic story. 聽到那個悲慘的故事後，她的眼中充滿了悲傷。
The mournful music filled the quiet room with a sorrowful atmosphere. 憂傷的音樂讓安靜的房間充滿了悲傷的氣氛。
She gave a sorrowful look at the old photographs of her childhood home. 她悲傷地看著童年舊家的老照片。
I'm very sorry for being late; the traffic was terrible. 很抱歉我遲到了，交通太糟糕了。
She said she was sorry for hurting your feelings. 她說她很抱歉傷了妳的感情。
What sort of music do you like to listen to in your free time? 你空閒時間喜歡聽哪種音樂？
The machine can automatically sort the mail by zip code. 這台機器可以根據郵遞區號自動分類郵件。

meaning: 透過排序將其排列成某種順序。
sentences: a sorted list of numbers 已排序的數字列表
The report describes the result as sorted. 該報告將結果描述為已排序。
Listening to classical music always brings peace to my soul. 聽古典音樂總能帶給我的靈魂平靜。
She is a kind and generous soul who is always helping others. 她是一位善良慷慨的人，總是樂於助人。
The sound of the ocean waves was very relaxing and peaceful. 海浪的聲音讓人感到非常放鬆且平靜。
That sounds like a great idea! Let's do it. 聽起來是個好主意！我們就這麼辦吧。

meaning: 聲音的現在分詞和動名詞
sentences: Little Mary was sounding very sleepy, so I tucked her in bed. 小瑪莉聽起來很睏，所以我把她抱到床上。
"Assist"'s sense ‘to be present (at a ceremony, entertainment, etc.)’, now uncommon and sounding affected, is a Gallicism. “協助”的意思是“在場（儀式、娛樂等）”，現在已經不常見了，而且聽起來很做作，是一種法國語。

meaning: 徹底地；以沒有缺陷或不足的方式。
sentences: He was soundly thrashed by the semi-professional boxer. 他被半職業拳擊手狠狠地打了一頓。
The team responded soundly to the change. 團隊對這項變化反應良好。
My mother is making a delicious hot chicken soup for dinner. 我媽媽正在煮美味的熱雞湯當晚餐。
Would you like some soup or a salad to start with? 你想來點湯或沙拉當開胃菜嗎？
The lemon juice has a very sharp and sour taste that I like. 檸檬汁有一種我喜愛的強烈酸味。
The milk has gone sour because it was left out of the refrigerator. 牛奶因為沒放進冰箱而變酸了。
The internet is a vast source of information on various topics. 互聯網是關於各種主題的龐大資訊來源。
Solar and wind power are important sources of renewable energy. 太陽能與風能是可再生能源的重要來源。
Kenting is located in the south of Taiwan and has beautiful beaches. 墾丁位於台灣南部，擁有美麗的海灘。
The birds are flying south for the winter. 鳥兒正向南飛去度冬。
We took the southbound train to Barcelona. 我們搭乘南行火車前往巴塞隆納。
Something described as southbound is which is (or will be) travelling south. 所謂南行是指正在（或將要）向南行駛的東西。

meaning: 位於東南方向或東南方向；東南;東南方向的。
sentences: A southeast course. 東南方向的球場。
Something described as southeast is situated toward or in the direction of the southeast; southeastward; southeasterly. 被描述為東南的事物位於東南方向或方向；東南;東南方向。
The southeastern part of the country is the most affluent. 該國東南部地區是最富裕的地區。
Something described as southeastern is of or pertaining to the southeast. 被描述為東南部的事物屬於或屬於東南部。
Warm, moist air was brought by southerly winds 南風帶來溫暖濕潤的空氣
The report describes the result as southerly. 報告將結果描述為偏南風。
Kenting is located in the southern part of Taiwan and has beaches. 墾丁位於台灣南部，擁有美麗的海灘。
Many southern European countries are famous for their history. 許多南歐國家以其悠久的歷史聞名。

meaning: 位於或指向南方；向南移動或面向南。
sentences: Something described as southward is situated or directed towards the south; moving or facing towards the south. 被描述為向南的事物位於或指向南方；移動或面向南方。
The word southward is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 向南這個字常用來形容人、事或情況。

meaning: 位於西南方向或西南方向；向西南;西南風。
sentences: A southwest course. 西南航線。
Something described as southwest is situated toward or in the direction of the southwest; southwestward; southwesterly. 被描述為西南的事物位於西南或朝向西南的方向；向西南;西南風。

meaning: 屬於或關於西南地區的。
sentences: Locals think southwestern sunsets are the most beautiful. 當地人認為西南日落是最美的。
Something described as southwestern is of or pertaining to the southwest. 被描述為西南的事物屬於或屬於西南。
I bought a small model of the Eiffel Tower as a souvenir of my trip to Paris. 我買了一個巴黎鐵塔的小模型，作為巴黎之旅的紀念品。
The shop sells a wide variety of local souvenirs and handmade crafts. 這家商店出售各式各樣的地方紀念品和手工藝品。
The country fought hard to maintain its status as a sovereign state. 該國為了維護其作為主權國家的地位而艱苦奮鬥。
The sovereign ruler of the empire addressed the nation on television. 帝國的君主（最高統治者）在電視上向全國發表了講話。
The country fought hard to maintain its national sovereignty and independence. 這個國家為了維護國家主權和獨立而艱苦奮鬥。
The dispute over the island's sovereignty has lasted for several decades. 關於該島主權的爭端已持續了幾十年。
Spring is the best time to sow seeds in your vegetable garden. 春天是在菜園播種的最佳時機。
His unusual behavior began to sow seeds of doubt among his colleagues. 他反常的行為開始在同事中引起（播下種子）懷疑。

meaning: 播種某物的行為或過程。
sentences: annual sowings of wheat 每年小麥播種量
The term sowing refers to The act or process by which something is sown. 播種一詞是指播種某物的行為或過程。
I like to use soy milk in my morning coffee. 我喜歡在晨間咖啡中加入豆漿（大豆奶）。
She added a splash of soy sauce to the stir-fry. 她在熱炒裡加了一點醬油。
Soybeans are a key ingredient in many traditional Asian foods. 大豆是許多傳統亞洲食物的主要食材。
Taiwan is a major producer of high-quality organic soybeans. 台灣是高品質有機大豆的主要產地。
She went to a luxury spa for a relaxing weekend. 她去了一家豪華水療中心過了一個放鬆的週末。
The hotel features an indoor swimming pool and a spa. 飯店設有一個室內游泳池和一個水療中心。
Is there enough space in the car for all of our suitcases? 車裡有足夠空間放我們所有的行李箱嗎？
She is very interested in outer space and astronomy. 她對外太空和天文學非常感興趣。
The futuristic spacecraft set out on a mission to explore distant planets. 未來主義的太空船出發去執行探索遙遠行星的任務。
The astronauts returned safely to Earth in their small space capsule. 太空人搭乘他們的小型太空艙（太空船）安全返回地球。

meaning: 物體或人被空間分隔開的方式。
sentences: The spacing of the desks in the exam hall was intended to prevent candidates from copying each other's work. 考場內桌子的間距是為了防止考生互相抄襲作業。
The term spacing refers to A way in which objects or people are separated by spaces. 術語「間距」是指物體或人被空間分隔開的方式。
They moved to a spacious apartment in the suburbs with plenty of light. 他們搬到郊區一個採光充足且寬敞的公寓。
The hotel features spacious rooms and a beautiful rooftop garden. 該飯店的特色是寬敞的房間和美麗的頂層花園。

meaning: 鏟子、鐵鍬、（撲克牌中的）黑桃
sentences: He used a sharp spade to dig a hole for the new apple tree in the garden. 他用一把鋒利的鏟子在花園裡為那棵新蘋果樹挖了一個洞。
In the card game, the ace of spades is often considered the most powerful card. 在紙牌遊戲中，黑桃 A 通常被認為是最強大的牌。
My favorite Italian dish is classic spaghetti carbonara with cream. 我最喜歡的義大利菜是經典的奶油培根義大利麵。
She made a batch of delicious spaghetti for the family dinner. 她為家庭晚餐做了一大份美味的義大利麵。
The new bridge has a total span of about five hundred meters. 新橋的總跨度（長度）約為五百公尺。
The study focused on changes in the region over a ten-year span. 該研究聚焦於該地區在十年間（跨度）發生的變化。

meaning: 快速移動或轉動，如機器的齒輪或船帆。
sentences: The ship was really spanking along. 船確實一路顛簸。
To spank means to move or turn rapidly, as the gears of a machine or the sails of a ship. 打屁股意味著快速移動或轉動，就像機器的齒輪或船的帆一樣。
a spanking good time 一段美好的時光
The team responded spanking to the change. 團隊對這項變化做出了嚴厲的回應。
The mechanic used a spanner to tighten the bolts. 技工利用扳手擰緊螺栓。
Make sure you have a reliable set of spanners in your toolkit. 確保你的工具箱裡有一套可靠的扳手。
We practiced using spar in two different sentences. 我們練習把 spar 放進兩個不同句子裡。
We discussed the term spar in class today. 我們今天在課堂上討論了 spar 這個詞。
Do you have a spare pen that I could borrow for the meeting? 你有備用的筆可以借我開會用嗎？
In my spare time, I enjoy reading books and listening to classical music. 在空閒（多餘的）時間，我喜歡看書和聽古典音樂。

meaning: 以節約的方式；節儉、節制、吝嗇、矜持、克制等；稀疏地。
sentences: If someone acts sparingly, they do so in a way that is in a sparing manner; with frugality, moderation, scantiness, reserve, forbearance, or the like; sparsely. 如果某人行事謹慎，那麼他們會以謹慎的方式行事；節儉、節制、吝嗇、矜持、克制等；稀疏地。
The speaker responded sparingly during the discussion. 發言者在討論期間很少做出回應。
A tiny spark from the fireplace landed on the carpet and caused a small fire. 壁爐裡的一點微小火花掉在地毯上，引發了一場小火。
The new policy sparked a lot of debate among the local community. 這項新政策在當地社區引發（激發）了大量的辯論。
The diamond began to sparkle under the bright lights of the jewelry store. 鑽石在珠寶店明亮的燈光下開始閃耀。
She has a real sparkle in her eyes when she talks about her passion. 當她談論自己的熱情時，眼中閃爍著真正的活力（光芒）。
A small brown sparrow sat on the windowsill and chirped loudly. 一隻褐色的小麻雀停在窗台上，響亮地叫著。
We saw several sparrows feeding on the crumbs in the garden yesterday. 我們昨天看到幾隻麻雀在花園裡啄食麵包屑。
a sparse array, index, or matrix 稀疏數組、索引或矩陣
Something described as sparse is having widely spaced intervals. 被描述為稀疏的事物具有廣泛的間隔。

meaning: 以分散或稀疏的方式；相距甚遠；薄薄地。
sentences: a sparsely populated region 人口稀少的地區
The team responded sparsely to the change. 團隊對這項變化反應冷淡。

meaning: 一塊肌肉、一組肌肉或一個中空器官的突然、不自主的收縮。
sentences: Jessica went into spasms after eating a peanut. 傑西卡吃了花生後開始痙攣。
The term spasm refers to A sudden, involuntary contraction of a muscle, a group of muscles, or a hollow organ. 痙攣一詞是指一塊肌肉、一組肌肉或一個中空器官的突然、不自主的收縮。
get into a trivial spat over punctuality 因守時問題發生爭執
have a vicious spat with the cousins 與表兄弟發生惡毒爭吵
Something described as spatial is pertaining to (the dimension of) space. 被描述為空間的東西與空間（的維度）有關。
The word spatial is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 空間這個字通常用來描述人、事物或情況。
She used a spatula to flip the pancakes in the pan. 她用抹刀在鍋裡翻轉煎餅。
The pharmacist used a small spatula to measure the medicine. 藥劑師利用小藥鏟測量藥物。
A frog spawns thousands of tadpoles every year. 青蛙每年產下數千隻蝌蚪。
To spawn means to produce or deposit (eggs) in water. 產卵是指在水中產生或沉積（卵）。
We need to spay our pet cat to prevent unwanted litters. 我們需要為寵物貓做結紮手術，以防止不必要的幼崽出生。
The clinic provides services to spay and neuter stray animals. 診所提供為流浪動物結紮的服務。
Could you please speak a bit louder? I can't hear you. 可以請你大聲一點嗎？我聽不見。
How many languages can you speak fluently? 你能流利地說幾種語言？
The guest speaker gave an inspiring speech to the graduates. 客座講師對畢業生們發表了一場激勵人心的演講。
Could you please turn up the volume on the computer speakers? 你能調大電腦揚聲器的音量嗎？

meaning: 一個人用特定語言進行語音溝通的能力。
sentences: I can read and understand most texts in German, but my speaking is awful. 我可以閱讀和理解大多數德語文本，但我的口語很糟糕。

Does the definition of 'spear' change depending on the context? 「spear」的定義會根據語境而改變嗎？

meaning: 熱心地推動或競選（一項努力、專案等）；來指揮。
sentences: He spearheaded the entire project from day one. 他從第一天起就領導了整個專案。

meaning: 指定，尤其是在正式的規範文件中。
sentences: To spec means to specify, especially in a formal specification document. To spec 的意思是指定，尤其是在正式的規範文件中。

meaning: 一個證明、公理、問題或定義，其情況完全被另一個更廣泛的概念覆蓋。
sentences: A triangle is a specialization of a polygon to one with exactly three sides. 三角形是多邊形的 特化 ，它剛好有三個邊。 三角形是多邊形的特化，具有剛好三個邊。 三角形是烘焙的特化，它剛好有三個邊。
