She has a very sweet voice and loves to sing. 她有一副非常甜美的嗓音且熱愛唱歌。
"sweet corn" is useful when you want to sound natural in conversation. 當你想讓對話更自然時，「sweet corn」非常好用。
We used "sweet corn" in today's dialogue practice. 我們在今天的對話練習中用了「sweet corn」。
"sweet potato" is useful when you want to sound natural in conversation. 當你想讓對話更自然時，「sweet potato」非常好用。
I heard "sweet potato" in a podcast and wrote it in my notebook. 我在 Podcast 聽到「sweet potato」，就把它記進筆記本。
I heard "sweet talk" in a podcast and wrote it in my notebook. 我在 Podcast 聽到「sweet talk」，就把它記進筆記本。
You can use "sweet talk" in emails and daily conversations. 你可以在 email 和日常對話中使用「sweet talk」。
The manager gave a sweet-and-sour answer during the meeting. 經理在會議中給出了一個很sweet-and-sour的回答。
The app has a sweet-and-sour interface for new users. 這個 App 的介面對新手來說很sweet-and-sour。
The engineer wrote down sweet-talk with the note "四对……甜言密语". 工程師把 sweet-talk 記下來，並註記「四对……甜言密语」。
We practiced using sweet-talk in two different sentences. 我們練習把 sweet-talk 放進兩個不同句子裡。
Mia sweetened the report carefully yesterday. Mia昨天仔細地sweeten了報告。
We had to sweeten quickly to meet the deadline. 為了趕上期限，我們必須迅速sweeten。
Our team invited a skilled sweetener to lead the workshop. 我們團隊邀請了一位有經驗的sweetener帶領工作坊。
The sweetener explained the problem clearly to everyone. 這位sweetener清楚地向大家說明了問題。
The sweetheart explained the problem clearly to everyone. 這位sweetheart清楚地向大家說明了問題。
During the meeting, the sweetheart answered every question patiently. 會議中，這位sweetheart耐心回答了每個問題。
Can I have a box of sweeties for being a good boy? 作為一個好孩子，我可以得到一盒糖果嗎？
The term sweetie refers to a sweet; a candy. 術語“sweetie”指的是糖果；一顆糖果。
The feedback was clear and sweetish. 這份回饋清楚而且sweetish。
That is a sweetish way to handle the list. 那是處理清單時很sweetish的方法。

meaning: 令人愉快 處置;;a reltle="mw:WikiLink" href="/wiki/kindness" /wiki;] 善良。
sentences: Ruth's overwhelming sweetness made Robert forget about his hopelessly low school grades. 露絲壓倒性的 甜蜜 讓羅伯特忘記了他低得可憐的成績。 露絲的甜蜜讓羅伯特忘記了他低得可憐的成績。 露絲壓倒性的甜蜜讓羅伯特忘記了他低得可憐的成績。
The term sweetness refers to A pleasant disposition; kindness. 甜蜜一詞指的是 令人愉快 處置; ； 甜蜜這個字是指令人愉快的性情；仁慈。 甜蜜指的是愉快的付出； ；
The wound on his arm managed to swell up after the insect bite. 他手臂上的傷口在蟲咬後竟然腫了起來。
The river managed to swell due to the heavy and continuous rain. 河水因為持續大雨而竟然漲了起來。
Something described as swept is cleared of mines (explosive devices). 被描述為掃除的物體已清除了地雷（爆炸裝置）。
The word swept is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「掃蕩」這個字常用來形容人、事物或情況。
The company took swift action to address the customer complaint. 公司採取了迅速的行動來處理客戶投訴。
The swallow is a small bird known for its swift and agile flight. 燕子是一種以飛行迅速敏捷聞名的小鳥。
I love to go for a swim in the outdoor pool every morning. 我喜愛每天早上在戶外泳池游泳。
He managed to swim across the lake in just thirty minutes. 他設法在短短三十分鐘內游過了那座湖。
The term swimmer refers to a protuberance on the leg of a horse. 「游泳者」一詞指的是馬腿上的突起。
The lesson introduced swimmer as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「游泳者」這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 在水中維持和推動身體的行為或藝術。
sentences: Triathlon competitors take part in open water swimming. 鐵人三項運動員參加公開水域游泳。
The term swimming refers to The act or art of sustaining and propelling the body in water. 游泳一詞是指在水中維持和推動身體的行為或藝術。
She bought a beautiful new swimsuit for her summer vacation. 她為暑假買了一件漂亮的新泳裝。
Don't forget to pack your swimsuit; the hotel has a great pool. 別忘了帶上泳裝；飯店有一個很棒的泳池。

meaning: 困難或尷尬的事；一種痛苦。
sentences: That old car is a swine to manoeuvre. 那輛舊車很難操控。
The term swine refers to something difficult or awkward; a pain. 豬這個字指的是困難或尷尬的事；一種痛苦。
The children were happily playing on the swings in the park. 孩子們正在公園裡開心地玩鞦韆。
He likes to listen to jazz and swing music while he's working. 他喜歡在工作時聽爵士樂和搖擺樂。

meaning: 粗略的猜測；估計或贓物。
sentences: Take a swipe at the answer, even if you're not sure. 即使您不確定，也可以輕掃一下答案。
The term swipe refers to a rough guess; an estimate or swag. 術語“滑動”指的是粗略的猜測；估計或贓物。
I swirled my brush around in the paint. 我在顏料裡旋轉畫筆。
To swirl means to twist or whirl, as an eddy. 漩渦的意思是像渦流一樣扭曲或旋轉。

meaning: 刻薄或以其他方式表現得女性化。
sentences: I shall not swish; I'll merely act limp-wristed. 我不會漱口；我只會表現得手軟。
People often swish when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會揮汗如雨。
Please flip the light switch when you leave the office. 離開辦公室時請隨手關燈（撥動開關）。
The company decided to switch to a new software system next year. 公司決定明年更換到一個新的軟體系統。

meaning: 將投資從一個基金轉移到另一個基金。
sentences: The term switching refers to The transference of an investment from one fund to another. 術語轉換是指將投資從一個基金轉移到另一個基金。
We learned the meaning of switching during today's lesson. 我們在今天的課程中學習了切換的含義。

meaning: 使人能克服逆境的思想或品格的力量；信心;意志的力量。
sentences: Bob ain't got no swivel. 鮑勃沒有旋轉裝置。
The term swivel refers to Strength of mind or character that enables one to overcome adversity; confidence; force of will. 旋轉一詞指的是使一個人能夠克服逆境的精神或性格的力量；信心;意志的力量。

meaning: 突出或異常膨脹（如因受傷或疾病）。
sentences: swollen ankle 腳踝腫脹
swollen knee 膝蓋腫脹
The fans swooned when the famous singer walked onto the stage. 當那位著名歌手走上台時，粉絲們都神魂顛倒了。
She felt like she was about to swoon from the heat. 她覺得自己快要熱得昏過去了。

meaning: 突然向下飛行或滑翔； （在空中）俯衝或急速下降。
sentences: The lone eagle swooped down into the lake, snatching its prey, a small fish. 孤鷹俯衝入湖，抓住了它的獵物——一條小魚。
To swoop means to fly or glide downwards suddenly; to plunge (in the air) or nosedive. 俯衝意味著突然向下飛行或滑翔； （在空中）俯衝或急速下降。
The brave knight unsheathed his sharp silver sword for battle. 勇敢的騎士拔出他那把鋒利的銀劍準備戰鬥。
Ancient swords are often displayed in museums as historical artifacts. 古劍常在博物館中作為歷史文物展示。

meaning: 擅長在運動或格鬥中使用劍的人；擊劍運動員。
sentences: He is a remarkable swordsman. 他是一位出色的劍客。
The term swordsman refers to A person skilled at using swords in sport or combat; a fencer. 劍客一詞是指在運動或戰鬥中熟練使用劍的人；擊劍運動員。
His sworn statement convinced the judge. 他的宣誓陳述說服了法官。
Something described as sworn is given or declared under oath. 所謂宣誓的事是在宣誓下給予或宣告的。
He is surrounded by sycophants who always agree with him. 他身邊圍繞著總是贊同他的諂媚者。
She is not a sycophant and is always honest with her opinions. 她不是個奉承者，對自己的觀點始終誠實。
The word 'banana' has three syllables: ba-na-na. 「banana」這個單字有三個音節：ba-na-na。
Please pronounce each syllable clearly so that everyone can understand you. 請清晰地發出每個音節，以便大家都能聽懂你的話。
The teacher handed out the syllabus for the new course. 老師發放了新課程的教學大綱。
Make sure you read the syllabus carefully before the first class. 上第一堂課前，請務必仔細閱讀課程提綱。

meaning: 一種用於拉出坑支柱的棘輪裝置。
sentences: The term sylvester refers to a ratchet device for pulling out pit props. 西爾維斯特一詞是指用於拉出坑支柱的棘輪裝置。
The lesson introduced sylvester as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了西爾維斯特作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 屬於或與 共生 在一起 。
sentences: A lichen is a fungus with symbiotic algae among its cells. 地衣是一種真菌，其細胞中有 共生 藻類。 地衣是一種真菌，其細胞內有共生藻類。 地衣是真菌的一種，其細胞共生於藻類。
The report describes the result as symbiotic. 該報告將這一結果描述為共生的。 該報告將這一結果描述為共生的。 該報告將這一結果描述為共生的。
The white dove is a universal symbol of international peace. 白鴿是國際和平的通用象徵。
Each symbol on the map represents a different type of building. 地圖上的每個符號代表不同類型的建築。
The dove is often used as a symbolic representation of peace and harmony. 鴿子常被用作和平與和諧的象徵性代表。
The gift was a symbolic gesture of friendship and cooperation between the countries. 這份禮物是兩國之間友誼與合作的象徵性姿態。

meaning: 將部分或成分組合在一起。
sentences: The term symbolism refers to a combining together of parts or ingredients. 象徵主義一詞是指部分或成分的組合。
The lesson introduced symbolism as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了象徵主義作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The white dove is used to symbolize peace and harmony between nations. 白鴿被用來象徵各國之間的和平與和諧。
In many cultures, the color red is used to symbolize luck and happiness. 在許多文化中，紅色被用來代表（象徵）運氣與快樂。

meaning: 集合 S 上的關係 R，使得 xRy 當且僅當 yRx 對 S 的所有成員 x 和 y（也就是說，如果關係在任何元素和第二個元素之間成立，那麼它也在第二個元素和第一個元素之間成立）。
sentences: "Is a sibling of" is a symmetric relation. 「是……的兄弟姊妹」是對稱關係。

Something described as symmetric is of a relation R on a set S, such that xRy if and only if yRx for all members x and y of S (that is, if the relation holds between any element and a second, it also holds between the second and the first). 被描述為對稱的東西是集合 S 上的關係 R，使得 xRy 當且僅當 yRx 對於 S 的所有成員 x 和 y（也就是說，如果該關係在任何元素和第二個元素之間成立，那麼它也在第二個元素和第一個元素之間成立）。
The butterfly has beautiful symmetrical wings. 蝴蝶有著漂亮對稱的翅膀。
The design of the building is perfectly symmetrical. 這棟建築的設計完全對稱。
The building's design features a high level of classical symmetry and beauty. 這座建築的設計展現了高度的古典對稱美。
The artist used symmetry to create a sense of balance in her painting. 藝術家利用對稱性在畫作中創造出一種平衡感。

meaning: 富有同情心的、憐憫的、支持的
sentences: She gave a sympathetic ear to her friend who was going through a hard time. 她耐心地傾聽（給予同情的耳朵）正處於困境的朋友訴苦。
The manager was sympathetic to his request for a few days off due to family issues. 經理對他因家庭問題請假幾天的要求表示理解（支持）。
I can really sympathize with your situation, as I had a similar problem. 我非常同情（理解）你的處境，因為我也有過類似的問題。
While I don't agree with all his views, I do sympathize with his goals. 雖然我不完全同意他的所有觀點，但我認同他的目標。
We expressed our deepest sympathy to the family for their great loss. 我們對那家人的重大損失表示最深切的同情（慰問）。
I have a lot of sympathy for students who have to work while studying. 我非常同情那些必須邊工作邊讀書的學生。
She enjoyed the rich symphonic sound of the concert. 她很享受音樂會中豐富的交響樂聲。
The band incorporated symphonic elements into their rock music. 樂團將交響樂元素融入他們的搖滾音樂中。
The local symphony orchestra performed a selection of classical masterpieces. 當地交響樂團演奏了一系列古典名作。
The young musician's first symphony received a lot of positive reviews. 這位年輕音樂家的首部交響曲獲得了大量好評。

meaning: 討論某個主題的會議或其他會議，尤其是參與者進行演示的會議。
sentences: The term symposium refers to a conference or other meeting for discussion of a topic, especially one in which the participants make presentations. 研討會一詞是指討論某個主題的會議或其他會議，特別是參與者進行演示的會議。
The lesson introduced symposium as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了研討會作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
A high fever and persistent cough are common symptoms of the flu. 高燒和持續咳嗽是流感的常見症狀。
The sudden increase in crime is a symptom of deeper social problems. 犯罪率的突然增加是深層社會問題的徵兆。

meaning: 構成症狀或指徵；特徵性的、指示性的。
sentences: The city's problems are symptomatic of the crisis that is spreading throughout the country. 這座城市的問題是正在全國蔓延的危機的症狀。
Something described as symptomatic is constituting a symptom or indication; characteristic, indicative. 被描述為有症狀的事物構成症狀或指徵；特徵性的、指示性的。

meaning: 猶太人或撒瑪利亞人的禮拜場所。
sentences: The term synagogue refers to a place of worship for Jews or Samaritans. 猶太教堂一詞指的是猶太人或撒瑪利亞人的禮拜場所。
The lesson introduced synagogue as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了猶太教堂作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 突觸。神經元彼此傳遞訊號的連接處。
sentences: A synapse allows one neuron to pass signals to another cell. 突觸讓一個神經元能把訊號傳給另一個細胞。
Learning may strengthen communication at the synapse. 學習可能會增強突觸處的訊息傳遞。

meaning: 突觸的或與之相關的－神經元末端和另一個細胞之間的連接處。
sentences: Something described as synaptic is of or relating to a synapse—the junction between the terminal of a neuron and another cell. Something described as synaptic is of 或 relating to a synapse—the junction between the terminal of a neuron and another cell.
The word synaptic is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 突觸這個字通常用來描述人、事物或情況。

meaning: 同步，尤指資料同步、時間同步或音樂與影片同步。
sentences: Our cloud storage automatically syncs your files to all your devices. 我們的雲端儲存會自動將您的檔案同步到您的所有裝置。
He synced his phone to the laptop to transfer data about the field trip. 他將手機與筆記型電腦同步，以傳輸有關實地考察的數據。

meaning: 正在同步的狀態或屬性。
sentences: The generator went off line when it lost synchronization with the power line. 當發電機與電力線失去同步時，發電機就離線了。
The term synchronization refers to The state or property of being synchronized. 術語「同步」是指被同步的狀態或屬性。

meaning: 達到同步、共同、協調、結合。
sentences: The synchronized swimmers did everything together, even breathing at the same time. 花式游泳選手們一起完成所有動作，甚至同時呼吸。
The report describes the result as synchronized. 該報告將結果描述為同步。

meaning: 為處理某些特定業務或促進共同利益而組成的個人或公司團體；自協調小組。
sentences: a gambling syndicate 賭博集團

The term syndicate refers to a group of individuals or companies formed to transact some specific business, or to promote a common interest; a self-coordinating group. 辛迪加一詞是指為進行某些特定業務或促進共同利益而組成的一組個人或公司；一個自我協調的小組。
Down syndrome is a genetic condition that affects a person's development. 唐氏症候群是一種影響個人發展的遺傳性疾病。
The report highlights the common symptoms of chronic fatigue syndrome. 報告強調了慢性疲勞症候群的常見症狀。
The two teams decided to synergize their efforts to finish the project faster. 這兩個團隊決定協同合作，好讓專案更快完成。
Good leaders know how to synergize different talents within a group. 優秀的領導者懂得如何讓團隊中不同的才能產生綜效。

meaning: 具有民事權力的集會或理事會（正式）；立法機構。
sentences: The term synod refers to an assembly or council having civil authority (formal); a legislative body. 主教會議一詞是指具有民事權力的集會或理事會（正式）；一個立法機構。
The lesson introduced synod as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了會議作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The word 'large' is a common synonym for the word 'big' in English. 「large」是英語中「big」一詞常用的同義詞。
Learning synonyms and antonyms can help you broaden your vocabulary. 學習同義詞和反義詞可以幫助你擴大詞彙量。
Please read the synopsis of the book before the discussion. 討論前請先閱讀這本書的大綱。
He provided a brief synopsis of the project's goals. 他提供了該專案目標的簡要摘要。

meaning: 屬於、與文法相關或與文法相關。
sentences: The sentence “I saw he” contains a syntactic mistake. 「我看到他」這句話有語法錯誤。
The report describes the result as syntactic. 該報告將結果描述為句法。

meaning: 一組規則，用於控制單字如何組合以形成短語和句子。
sentences: The term syntax refers to a set of rules that govern how words are combined to form phrases and sentences. 語法一詞是指控制單字如何組合形成短語和句子的一組規則。
The lesson introduced syntax as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了文法作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 將兩種或多種物質結合起來生產新產品。
sentences: Her theory synthesizes ideas from several different disciplines. 她的理論綜合了幾個不同學科的想法。
People often synthesize when the situation calls for it. 人們經常在情況需要時進行綜合。
The jacket is made of a durable synthetic material that is water-resistant. 這件外套是由耐用的合成（人造）材料製成的，具有防水性。
Some modern perfumes are made using synthetic fragrances and chemicals. 一些現代香水是利用合成香精和化學物質製成的。
The nurse used a sterile syringe to administer the injection. 護士利用無菌注射器進行注射。
He needed a new set of needles and syringes for his medication. 他需要一套新的針頭和注射器來用藥。
She poured some sweet maple syrup over her fresh pancakes for breakfast. 她在早餐的新鮮鬆餅上倒了一些甜楓糖漿。
The doctor prescribed a cough syrup to help relieve the patient's symptoms. 醫生開了一種止咳糖漿來幫助緩解病人的症狀。
The new computer system is much faster and more efficient. 新電腦系統速度更快且更高效。
Education is a vital part of the nation's social system. 教育是國家社會制度中至關重要的一部分。
The company needs a more systematic approach to quality control. 公司需要一種更有系統的方法來進行品質控制。
He carried out a systematic search of the entire house to find the missing keys. 他對整個房子進行了有條理的搜尋，以尋找丟失的鑰匙。

meaning: 嵌入並遍及並影響整個系統、團體、機構、經濟、市場或社會。
sentences: Something described as systemic is embedded within and spread throughout and affecting a whole system, group, body, economy, market, or society. 被描述為系統性的東西嵌入並傳播到整個系統、團體、機構、經濟、市場或社會，並影響整個系統、群體、機構、經濟、市場或社會。
The word systemic is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 系統性一詞通常用於描述人、事物或情況。
